name: =?utf-8?Q?Lt.=20Col.=20=E2=80=9CBull=E2=80=9D=20Gurfein=20=28Ret.=29?=
subject: Be a hero, help a hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots
body:
They sacrificed for our freedom. Now it’s time we repay that debt.

https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av

Friend,

The holiday season is a joyous time for many.

But, sadly, there are American Heroes who will be missing from the festivities this year.

Bob Bales, Neftaly Platero, and Calvin Gibbs are three of these Warriors currently behind bars and separated from loved ones.
https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av

These innocent Warriors were wrongly accused of crimes while serving in the United States’ Armed Forces.

They were ripped away from their families and forced to endure long trials. Some are even threatened with LIFE in prison.
BRING OUR HEROES HOME (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)

These Warriors sacrificed so much for our country and deserve more than sham trials and media scrutiny. That’s why the United American Patriots team is fighting to get them the justice they’re owed.

We are doing everything we can to secure the best legal defense teams for their cases and generate more positive public awareness.

But if we’re going to get these Heroes home for the holidays, we need the support of Patriots like you.

Can we count on you to make a contribution to our Warrior Fund? (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $250 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $100 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $75 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $50 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $35 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: OTHER (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)

Our mission here at UAP is to Defend the Defenders of our country. The work we do - supported and funded by patriots like you - helps clear the names of these veterans and their families.

Today, I ask you to consider donating at this secure link to help bring these men home to enjoy the holiday season for years to come: https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-5527327/bring-our-heroes-home (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)

Thank you,
https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av

David “Bull” Gurfein

Lt. Col., USMCR (Ret.)

CEO, United American Patriots

UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible.
United American Patriots
1800 Diagonal Road, Suite 600, Alexandria, VA 22314
571-366-1835

https://www.uap.org (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We cannot let this trend continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Now that we’re approaching the holidays and the end of 2022, our fundraising efforts are more urgent than ever as we race to make sure every box is checked for our budget. Unfortunately, our latest internal review of our finances shows our numbers rapidly declining -- **_we can’t let this trend continue, Peter.**_
[**We’re asking you to chip in $3 right now to help us get our fundraising back on track -- can Pramila count on your support today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25379?refcode=em20221219-1971&t=1&akid=1971%2E420207%2EOgT3ZS)
**If _just 117 folks_ reading this email donated $3 to our campaign, we’ll get the fundraising boost we need** to keep Pramila in a strong position as she fights every day for the transformative policies we deserve.
Simply put, our fundraising has lagged behind where it needs to be these last few months. And catching up right now means Pramila won’t have to worry so much about fundraising going into a new session of Congress with a GOP-controlled House.
The clock is ticking towards the end of the year, which means our final fundraising deadline is drawing closer. [**Can you donate $3 to help us reverse this dramatic decline in fundraising?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25379?refcode=em20221219-1971&t=2&akid=1971%2E420207%2EOgT3ZS) **_Our fundraising must be strong heading into these last few critical few days of December._**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25379?refcode=em20221219-1971&t=21&akid=1971%2E420207%2EOgT3ZS)**
Your small-dollar donations go a long way to help Pramila fight back against the corporate lobbyists from Wall Street, Big Oil, and health insurance companies. With your support, Pramila can continue the fight to protect our environment, codify our rights, and expand our social safety net.
**Listen, we really need to see a boost in our fundraising numbers right now, or we’ll be in a much weaker position for 2023 -- and that’s not acceptable when so much is on the line.**
[**We're counting on you, Peter -- any amount at all truly makes a difference for us. Please consider donating what you can to give us a much-needed boost before the end of the year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25379?refcode=em20221219-1971&t=22&akid=1971%2E420207%2EOgT3ZS)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25379?refcode=em20221219-1971&t=23&akid=1971%2E420207%2EOgT3ZS)**
Thank you for your steadfast support for Pramila – we appreciate you, Peter.
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221219-1971-footer&t=24&refcode2=1971_420207_OgT3ZS&akid=1971%2E420207%2EOgT3ZS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=1971%2E420207%2EOgT3ZS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1971%2E420207%2EOgT3ZS)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team AOC
subject: A look back on the year in photos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Vote on your favorite photo of the year.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221219-3722-header&t=1&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
It’s been a busy year.
As we look back on highlights from the year, we wanted to share our digital scrapbook with some of our favorite photos from the year.
Thank you to all the campaign organizers, volunteers, staff, small dollar donors, grassroots candidates, and voters who worked so hard to make this year such a success.
[**Take a look at the photos below, then vote on your favorite and we’ll let you know which one wins Team AOC Photo of the Year!**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/photo-vote-2022/?source=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&t=2&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria meets with Starbucks Workers United union organizers in Astoria, Queens.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria, Senator Bernie Sanders, and Amazon Labor Union President Chris Smalls at an Amazon Labor Union rally at Amazon JFK8 in Staten Island.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria visits the New York Botanical Garden in The Bronx.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria with Amazon Labor Union leaders Derrick Palmer and Chris Smalls before a union rally.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria at the National Puerto Rican Day Parade.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria rallies with Working Famlies Party candidates to encourage constituents to vote on the WFP line in the general election.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria and Bronx Borough President Vanessa Gibson attend the City Island Memorial Day Parade.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria at an abortion rights rally in Union Square after the Supreme Court ruled to overturn Roe v. Wade in June 2022.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria tours the power plant of Co-op City, the largest affordable housing cooperative in the world — and now part of NY-14.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria takes questions from constituents at a listening forum in Astoria, Queens.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria attends a rally for Rep. Katie Porter's re-election at UC Irvine in California.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria meets new constituents in Co-op City, which will become part of NY-14 in January 2023.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria votes in Parkchester, The Bronx.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=15&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
### Alexandria with volunteers and constituents in Co-op City.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=16&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
Photo credits: Corey Torpie, Fiorella Bini, and Carlos Alonso
[**Have a favorite photo? Tell us your vote for Photo of the Year and we’ll let you know the winner in a future email.**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/photo-vote-2022/?source=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&t=17&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
Thank you so much for making all of this possible. Here’s to more progress and change in 2023.
— Team AOC
_Our movement is 100% people-powered._
**[VOLUNTEER](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14951?t=18&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-202212?refcode=em20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&t=20&refcode2=3722_2526796_TOkXbH&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221219-3722-P_FND_CTR_GRM&t=21&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=22&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=23&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=24&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3722%2E2526796%2ETOkXbH)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:

clean_body: How I'm going to make it happen | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress. If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy... My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. | | | | Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets. For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game. I’ll make you this promise right now, Friend: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most. We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves. But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. | | | | | | | | | Yours in Freedom, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress

subject: Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
What we can learn from 2022 | | | [](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=c8912bd714e04346bb41ecca7fd0a6c9&_e=6Dyus8f0oQ05kOaFmWRnBQRzZSL83ouqipQhdA7XyKS1huVEXonfzXWugA7YzrQYEwhnh86drLvl9myLPqUjHdMahFdJmWuL6oPj5Opcxd-hTqgTUxd9oYOkhkVnFxcDcBso8-G4sjRGaMUiKABnnEj5uM_gNYVP7VS_aAc7UEj7dckK1lhazBp4Kb28pwJb4TkQxqxeBU7Q8OWFMYSjj1_U3SuZfdhyQs9Mtxa9k4Ff-f1IWHa7rl7a3MGfSUDAiq5Jn_yI6MB_nOEsfeh53wK_NKpeyldZhs3TKfnljCUIt9ByZtWAVlb-9b3slL_jsSH0jXd0P-IMlFesbsnjdfqbuM2UVM1aGBPdwANLmdI%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot,

Last month, 16 states elected Republican governors over their radical Democrat opposition. The impact that these gubernatorial victories have on the future of our country cannot be overstated, and its abundantly clear that Americans are tired of high inflation, disastrous liberal agendas, and bad politics and policy coming out of Washington DC. Americans are turning back to conservatism.

That should all give us hope for our country and excite us for what awaits us in the next election cycle.

In 2023, there are only **THREE** states with gubernatorial elections - including my own re-election, right here in Mississippi. I am incredibly proud of what we have been able to accomplish during my first term as your Governor, including:
* The largest tax cuts in the history of Mississippi, returning over $500 million to taxpayers.
* The largest teacher pay raise in Mississippi history.
* The reversal of _Roe v Wade_ by the United States Supreme Court.
* $6 billion in new capital investment to the state.
* A #1 rank in the nation in both 4th grade math AND 4th grade reading improvements.
* The LOWEST unemployment rate in our state’s history.
* And almost $2.5 billion overestimates left after the last two fiscal years.

**This is what conservative leadership achieves. It keeps money in the hands of folks who earned it. It attracts new business. It improves education. And it protects the sanctity of life. **

clean_body: What we can learn from 2022 | | | Fellow Patriot, Last month, 16 states elected Republican governors over their radical Democrat opposition. The impact that these gubernatorial victories have on the future of our country cannot be overstated, and its abundantly clear that Americans are tired of high inflation, disastrous liberal agendas, and bad politics and policy coming out of Washington DC. Americans are turning back to conservatism. That should all give us hope for our country and excite us for what awaits us in the next election cycle. In 2023, there are only THREE states with gubernatorial elections - including my own re-election, right here in Mississippi. I am incredibly proud of what we have been able to accomplish during my first term as your Governor, including: The largest tax cuts in the history of Mississippi, returning over $500 million to taxpayers. The largest teacher pay raise in Mississippi history. The reversal of Roe v Wade by the United States Supreme Court. $6 billion in new capital investment to the state. A #1 rank in the nation in both 4th grade math AND 4th grade reading improvements. The LOWEST unemployment rate in our state’s history. And almost $2.5 billion overestimates left after the last two fiscal years. This is what conservative leadership achieves. It keeps money in the hands of folks who earned it. It attracts new business. It improves education. And it protects the sanctity of life. We’ve done so much, Fellow Patriot, and we’re not slowing down yet. As we prepare for our re-election campaign, we are working hard to raise funds into our campaign account to reach every voter with our message of conservative leadership. Can I count on you?** I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done to get us here. name: Brent Bozell
subject: Elon Musk bought a crime scene
body:
Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger, and I believe he may be right.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze778bld7nbn94jjhdt6fvkvlbbarmdt083dhbbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
Friend,

Elon Musk claims his life is in great danger -- and I believe he may be right.

Elon recently revealed to the world that a cabal of government and private sector elites are working in unison to influence the elections.

He didn't buy a social media company. He bought a crime scene showing corruption and election interference at the deepest levels of government and society.

21 This is just one example of the unified assault that the government and corporate elites are perpetuating on the American republic through **Big Tech censorship, radical leftwing propagandists in the media, and deep state agents in our government. **

And this is what the Media Research Center (MRC) has been revealing to the public, even before Elon Musk.

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

And we're going to war against the media to hold them accountable and expose their Deep State corruption.

[_**MRC is raising $15,000 before the New Year, and I need your help. Can you donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today? Click here >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2g1ai2rl4o4oaicdogakbcglib82m8cesosbqi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)

Now Elon is working to stop this, taking steps like firing Twitter's former deputy general counsel James Bake for suppression of information:
* Elon promised a blitz of internal Twitter documents -- the **Twitter Files** -- starting with the 2020 decision to block users from sharing coverage of Hunter Biden's leaked laptop files.

* Journalist Matt Taibbi shared that Baker had "vetted" the first installment of the **Twitter File** s, then **delayed** the release of the second installment in defiance of Elon's plan.

* Elon found that Baker's "explanation was . . . unconvincing" and promptly fired Baker.

Elon's life is at risk because he is exposing the Deep State Media -- so you and I can prepare for the battle for America's freedom. But this also shows the deep state agents are embedded in American corporations.

[_**Can you send your urgent donation to MRC and help us defeat Big Tech censors? Click here to send your gift today >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8kadv0h4rao7leie73p72862b7vvaaq3s77fue0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)

How does the Media Research Center expose the left-wing media?

MRC's Newsbuster has a Free Speech division that is solely dedicated to exposing Big Tech censorship. Through MRC's CensorTrack, we have recorded 4,769 instances of Big Tech censorship.

**Our CensorTrack has been used in high profile court cases against the Biden admin. **

MRC has DESTROYED the Media's reputation, but we still have a long way to go.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Friend, it is no exaggeration to say that the fight against the Deep State Media corruption is a fight for America itself. Can you join MRC and help us reach our goal of $15,000 this month?

**Click below to donate.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn4ke4m85nq6p92acutht21hqos2tmcg5v30t29g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgcn2kegg8khdsr5cf5j1efs4k1jjgq2j8353640_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoapuf58ckfbusdv16kq3asf7grej002k1ennd70_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu75epvte7nqtv3d9uf8e7frjlkvg92ia3hhf7mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zql0bu471lg60isc6ar64pb1r0514qrh20ruco3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zola0c91gqkm88591s064e25tmg7ili8pgj25gso_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc47o4aampaol57j1hil6i3a5m5icvv9v722ade0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb3sgnvvmf2bgbiqrokltliuimm51s000re68fe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqpo607hmvhg7hiajntcdr6ndh3h7fdknh2u4sa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34clh2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Save my son from the woke mob
body:
Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7665%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2bEVRqgisngKqMpVmHKHF5Q&sysid=1)
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97446%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IXxLsmP7Qn43xC6reteKKw&sysid=1)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97447%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ibNhgvnN88vwzLuuXvWyQA&sysid=1) [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97447%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ibNhgvnN88vwzLuuXvWyQA&sysid=1)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It’s been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn’t expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it’s all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor’s office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael’s back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael’s_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97448%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T6qmGTiJmHTT1%2fAj0Wj1sg&sysid=1)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97449%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DRu2elAcduVzBoIgskY3FQ&sysid=1)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97440%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=snMYc98JEIMtmbE37CeDng&sysid=1)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97441%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oNU%2b%2fcSTpK6RWvYOsBR7Mg&sysid=1)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97442%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TP3MbcvaoUoaya6wnWMbig&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97443%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t6dytOZ9tB4M4s4exArHUQ&sysid=1)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97444%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ImNhsRQOhEcZ%2fbtvh2K%2fkQ&sysid=1)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we’re defending, please visit**www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7665%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2bEVRqgisngKqMpVmHKHF5Q&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7665%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2bEVRqgisngKqMpVmHKHF5Q&sysid=1)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation...
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp4meon33gehang6gketltcdmruemdce7cc3612o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34cjh2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfbugi0q5bvqpdrntmg5ot44ql9oq31fiobn0sa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34cjh2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8a60ta4rhjs9lh1cpm5uaijehuruboboq29orp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34cjh2bs) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ will play out – and what it means for your money.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z77nh10odiijql1q1ch5uem756d62gg56kcs89h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clj62o34cjh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

# **#1 Item to Hoard**
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61277005:sCxChbDpN:m:1:2570829362:220DFD63780D450F1C5CE8F129FD361C:r). This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. These Survival Food Kits Are Famous for Selling Out... Now They're Back in Stock! These best-selling kits are back in stock... and you'll get loaded up with when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. People love these kits. It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... FREE Bonus #2: You'll get a Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. FREE Bonus #3: You also get their Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater. With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. FREE Bonus #4: You'll also get an Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library. With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... FREE Bonus #5: You also get their Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. FREE Bonus #6: You also get Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee. Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. FREE Bonus #7: You also get Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa. Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... FREE Bonus #8: You also get $25 OFF your next purchase. This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... FREE Bonus #9: You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order! It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now]() Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. First, you get their no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food anytime in the next 25 years and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. name: Freedom First Project
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Dear friend,C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzU0LTQ3OGI5OTc1YWExYjQ0ZTc5ODlkYjA2MDRkODJkNWUzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/tomA40yXaPPWuKjKvQc19Q) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Pursuit of Happiness and Your Property Rights
body:
Pursuit of Happiness and Your Property Rights By Rebecca ChaneyIn Genesis 1:28 we see instruction given to Adam and Eve by God. This is known as the Adamic Covenant. “God blessed them and said, be | |
---

| | | Pursuit of Happiness and Your Property Rights |
---|---|---
| |
---
By Rebecca Chaney
In Genesis 1:28 we see instruction given to Adam and Eve by God. This is known as the Adamic Covenant. “God blessed them and said, be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth and subdue it, and rule over the fish of the sea, over the birds of the sky, and over every living thing that moves on the earth.”
God is giving Adam property belongings to steward well. First, God says to fill the earth. Secondly, God tells them to subdue it. Lastly, God tells them to have dominion over it. Multiply, fill, subdue, and rule are tied to creativity and ingenuity. These require liberty. The word “fill” in Hebrew is connected to the word “replenish.” To replenish is scientific in nature. According to Webster’s 1828 dictionary, “replenish” means to recover, supply with abundance, to refill, to restock, and refresh. This requires observation and skill on how to reinvest something that needs to be supplied again.
There is an accountability process with stewardship. For example, in the Noahic Covenant, which predates the Ten Commandments, we see you cannot murder and get away with it. Bylaws are established. Genesis 9 comes before Exodus 20 but do not contradict one another. The Ten Commandments are moral absolutes to live peaceably. Man must abide in them and protect from encroachments that would seek to steal rights given by God. This includes the right to private property.
According to the Ten Commandments, you cannot steal. What does fundamental law say about stealing? _It is wrong_. Ideally if a person is caught stealing, due process should be applied with justice carried out. If you murder, you forfeit your life. If you steal, you replace. If you destroy property, you mend or replace.
In Genesis 9:1-17, we see the Noahic Covenant or Rainbow Covenant. We see through these scriptures that private property is inherent to humanity. It is a gift from God, and we have a responsibility to tend it. Stewardship is a sacred offering to the Lord and is tied to our obedience and worship to the Creator.
So how do the scriptural references tie into our nation’s founding documents and still hold application?
The Declaration of Independence contains four core principles that hold freedom’s frame in place:
1\. Self-evident truths (moral absolutes exist.)
2\. Endowed by our Creator with unalienable rights. (These are rights that not even government has the right to usurp.)
3\. Consent of the governed. (The people have a voice.)
4\. Pursuit of Happiness (The importance of free enterprise and private property rights.)
Governor William Bradford and the Pilgrims tried socialism. Bradford said this caused “much confusion and discontentment and prevented much employment that would have been to their benefit and comfort and caused people to allege weakness and inability.” After many of the Pilgrims starved to death, Bradford made two very important changes. He implemented _private property_ and _free enterprise_.
Bradford noted, “This had very good success, for it made all hands very industrious so as much more corn was planted, than otherwise would have been by any means the Governor or any other could use, and saved him a great deal of trouble, and gave far better content.”
The Founders knew that the cornerstone to a civil society was owning and maintaining private property. John Locke’s Second Treatise of Government was woven tightly into the American founding and into the Declaration of Independence. Thomas Jefferson, drafter of the Constitution, also took Locke’s words to heart. Locke asserts:
“ _The government cannot take from any man any party this property without his consent. For the preservation of property being the end of government, and that for which men enter society it necessarily supposes and requires, that the people should have property, without which they must be supposed to lose that by entering into society, which was the end for which they entered into it, too gross an absurdity for any man to own.”_
In _Commentaries on the Laws of England_ which influenced our founding documents, William Blackstone also applauds the right to property:
_“So great...is the regard of the law for private property, that it will not authorize the least violation of it; no, not even for the general good of the whole community. If a new road, for instance, were to be made through the grounds of a private person, it might perhaps be extensively beneficial to the public; but the law permits no man, or set of men, to do this without the consent of the owner of the land.”_
Owning and preserving property free from oppressive government intrusion serves as one of the core building blocks for a prosperous republic. James Madison, considered by many to be the Father of the Constitution, noted:
“ _Government is instituted no less for protection of property than of the persons, of individuals. The rights of property are committed into the same hands with the personal rights. Some attention ought, therefore, to be paid to property in the choice of those hands.”_
Our Founders acknowledged that a crucial purpose of any legitimate government is the _preservation_ of property. Founding Father John Adams wisely states, _“The moment the idea is admitted into society, that property is not as sacred as the laws of God, and there is not a force of law and public justice to protect it, anarchy and tyranny commence. If “Thou Shalt not covet,” and “Thou Shalt not steal,” were the commandments of Heaven, they must be made inviolable precepts in every society before it can be civilized or made free.”_
The rights to private property are a natural right and are protected by natural law. You do not even need the laws of nature’s God to tell you that. If you come for a man’s private property, he will be about as favorable to it as a bird would be to a nest raider and act accordingly. For humanity, acquiring private property is the fruit of physical and intellectual labor. The Framers knew safeguards were needed to protect and prevent from government theft. The Fifth Amendment in the Bill of Rights is clear: _“nor shall private property be taken for public use without just compensation.”_
The Takings Clause in the Fifth Amendment is a provision that holds the government responsible for compensating the owner of the property if the government takes it for some deemed public good. Arguments ensue over what constitutes “a taking.” Those who embrace power grabs by the federal government claim that “a taking” occurs only when the government physically seizes property.
However, “a taking” also occurs when the government, by an act of Congress, state legislature, or by an administrative regulation, destroys or diminishes the market value of a private property. These are called “regulatory takings.” Regulatory takings are similar to a physical taking. They impose significant restrictions on the property owner’s use of the property. The property owner can suffer financial setbacks if the restriction prevents economic development or the private use of their property.
Currently, the Supreme Court looks for ways to usurp unconstitutionally and increase power. They help other federal government entities usurp as well. This is a disservice and embarrassment to our founding and to the role of government branches.
According to the Constitution of the United States, the Supreme Court is the weakest link in the three branches of government, yet it aids in “regulatory takings” and undermines compensating the property owner. The criteria that define “a taking” is muddy and confounded. There is really no set formula to calculate how to compensate.
Frederic Bastiat warned us of legal plunder in _The Law._ We are living in post Constitutional times where we feel the weight of tyranny. Liberalism and Anti-Constitutional Republicanism equal government handouts and government takings. Constitutional Republicanism, which is America’s founding intent, promotes capitalism and private property.
Citizens are put through ridiculous rationales to justify why they should not be “taken from.” _The right to own property is a natural and fundamental right that should receive the highest of legal protection._ The citizen should not be the one jumping through hoops to prove government plunder. This is twisted and indicative of theft committed by a treasonous government. The burden should be placed on the government’s shoulders to justify “a taking” as necessary for public interest, and then the responsibility should be placed on the government to compensate for the negative impact placed on the property interests of the owner.
Rarely, preserving private property rights under legitimate authority can be “a taking” and can sometimes be justified. Before our Constitution, it was widely accepted with common sense that one neighbor did not have the right to interfere negatively or injure another neighbor’s property. You do not pollute upstream if you own land and expect it to be okay that you have polluted your neighbor downstream. The government exercises proper authority to protect and preserve societal good in that case. Government in that way is not trying to expand or enlarge itself. It is not trying then to confiscate for governmental purpose. The difference is clear and so is the principle.
Sadly, the government takes so liberally from the American citizen that there is not a reliable calculation by which to tally the cost of restitution. The government is swelling on its engorgement of regulatory feasting. Shall we call it like we see it? _The government steals from its citizens._ Why do we allow it?
What do we do? Where can we start to fight this theft?
We need practical proposals through the amendment process. We need to start local. We need to know our local laws and state constitutions. We need to make sure that legitimate governance protects private property rights. This also comes with understanding its obligation to pay the private property owner when government interferes with private ownership and use of private property for public interest.
If government action serves the public interests, the public must and should assume the responsibility and compensate the property owner who suffers the loss. The government should produce a cost/benefit analysis. This would require the burden and responsibility be placed on the government. To whom it costs, there is more willingness to be a good steward of the decision.
The Takings Clause is important enough to be in the Fifth Amendment. We should heed what it says. Citizens must educate themselves and others on truth, founding intent, and their role as civil stewards of the gifts we have been given.
Put the lid on government! We must restore liberty the way the Founders intended per the Ninth and Tenth Amendments. The federal and state governments are corrupt, and they will not stop taking until We the People put an end to it. Read the Declaration of Independence, the Constitution of the United States of America, the Bill of Rights, and most importantly, God’s Holy Word. Read, study, and know these precepts to defend and assert their foundational truths. Onward!
* * *

| About the Author |
---|---|---
| _Rebecca Chaney is the Director for Restore Liberty Mississippi, and she sits on the board for the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. She is a lifetime Patriot Academy Constitution Coach and has hosted Biblical Citizenship and Constitutional classes since 2020. She has helped to start these classes across the state of Mississippi. She is a homeschool Mom of seven years to her son and daughter._[__www.restore-liberty.org__](http://www.restore-liberty.org/) |
|
* * *
| The Caucus is a political organization dedicated to promoting the ideals of individual rights, limited government and free enterprise within the state of Mississippi.
| Mississippi Freedom Caucus
530 George Street, Suite 200
Jackson, MS 39202
www.FreedomCaucus.ms
662-469-6242
info@freedomcaucus.ms
---|---

She is a homeschool Mom of seven years to her son and daughter. | | | The Caucus is a political organization dedicated to promoting the ideals of individual rights, limited government and free enterprise within the state of Mississippi. | Mississippi Freedom Caucus 530 George Street, Suite 200 Jackson, MS 39202 www.FreedomCaucus.ms 662-469-6242 info@freedomcaucus.ms ---|--- You are currently subscribed to a mailing list of Mississippi Freedom Caucus. name: Your America
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7658%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=SwVSThIPoopubITmSS6Pcg&sysid=1)
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98556%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TlPptHSfMItBN4niUjWcnQ&sysid=1) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98557%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hVWpMbrt1adMEbJO%2bbeFPw&sysid=1) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she’s found is startling. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98558%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wxDWtUoPsp7FMxrlj6JVpg&sysid=1) She says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I’ve found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next.”** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this ‘transformation.’ She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it’s too late. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ will play out - and what it means for your money. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98559%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yUkLOV4fs6BhGrb6OqHBUQ&sysid=1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7658%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=SwVSThIPoopubITmSS6Pcg&sysid=1)

## [Tell the Justice Department to charge Trump for his crimes](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14cb1066-1380-4bee-b374-d9f36308f622/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | _(Already took this action? Forward it to friends so we can maximize the impact! Want to unsubscribe? See link at bottom)_

After carefully weighing the evidence, a bipartisan Congressional committee recommended the Justice Department charge Donald Trump with at least 4 separate crimes.

[**And the Justice Department should follow that recommendation.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf34ef24c-cddf-48a4-85c8-3667fc0a7a1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Yes, Justice needs to do its own investigation and make its own decision. [**But the evidence is out there in plain sight, and it is overwhelming. And Trump needs to pay for his crimes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fba1bf9-5db7-41bf-a42d-f3c0cf41d95a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And Justice needs to act. Trump's supporters are already making all kinds of threats and wild statements -- we need to show Justice that the overwhelming majority of us support legal action against Trump.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8krjtibaligs850afp2dvhrhprm27flkhj5vmkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clgm2o74cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvbpk4l9uttli5176nulkt7nsvlkbknuib4j2a90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clgm2o74cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlimd519i0kj00702s6cse3ehkj8k6pfvh9bqf58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clgm2o74cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf989d6bfe1fmhmanu578if2bpourkvsilo34dvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clgm2o74cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

body:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62100723:6Sdu3GGcN:m:1:3334294963:8AF1085E49E6475E74F42F179E3B940A:r)

Peter,

**In 2022, the NRA has fought tirelessly to protect your Second Amendment rights.**

In June, _the NRA won the Supreme Court case NYSRPA v. Bruen_ , the most significant Second Amendment ruling in more than a decade, which affirmed that the right to bear arms does _**not stop at a person's front door.**_

This year, _Georgia became the 25th state to legally recognize NRA-Backed Constitutional Carry_ , eliminating the need for government permission for law-abiding citizens to exercise their right to bear arms.

_The NRA also helped elect a band of NRA-endorsed candidates_ committed to defending Americans' sacred Second Amendment rights in Congress. The NRA has and will continue to work on a local, state, and national level to STOP gun-grabbers from trampling Americans' rights.

Peter, now that the year is coming to a close, we want to know what YOU think. You have been selected to take the **Official 2022 NRA Approval Poll.**

_The NRA is committed to fighting for you, and we want to ensure YOU approve of our efforts to protect your gun rights._

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Do you believe America has strayed from Christian principles?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America's history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that "a great wall of separation between Church and State" has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government.The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended.Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn't even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_"I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth-that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that 'except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.'"_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God's blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today's governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews._zHOhU75JbMtRA_U0puA)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who "governs the affairs of men" and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We've pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms-and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What's the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God's Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](http://trk.readactnews.-8nsMiKCvSejiVceMhw)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously.**[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](http://trk.readactnews.)** There is hope for the future of America-and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzNTQtZTJkOTc0MDY2MjBlNDQ4ZmI3YzVkMzk3NDA3NThhMzkiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/jvftmJPvPhQMbsHnWBSdqA) to unsubscribe.
---

body:
**Bill O'Reilly Unravels: Biden 's Hidden Inflation Plot**

**Biden is powerless to break the stranglehold of record inflation**

His Fed's skyrocketing interest rates aren't taming inflation

**They are forcing us into recession**

Biden's Inflation Reduction Act doesn't reduce inflation,

It funds a left-wing spending spree by **_[taxing your retirement accounts](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f759b4874cf94285a0917c2e91a2bcc5&_e=owcauWMmSfaXtgBE-Z-l9d2zWMVbfd8zt35BL9tXbegWVYfneBabsTWWqK5j9XMtLygU7f6D1BdZAnsy6P0LtbyzmkYFFfmvgGXaQDyH-TCSN2FNQuUW3czAhHfxXd6V1Unmlz9A1IO18-EM3NLhkqtDbC4UwcoFbuNCBFCJfDrzHxhG2-onm8VmO5AnDUlfLLZoeiRMN9fmFu2uHtj1n_GFq5xIKGTH7vOvqE3T3loPcFj5ujgbQ1i6qfAtx-3gPXp784zeZxx1Cf-Y85ucvSchnxA-vn3GDh1YYLDYBXhDRDlQYizzJf0614fQKP4iHaQ2BCIvCni4CO5abSgmNGUfbi5_bJWkKR9Dd3Xent4G2t4NG85G_dPMijlj5Z16mqe0XoyuPfNmKXFc3PIizHrXR8TDep8SHZR7sbQ0ipem6P2Pb1cFgsWd1rhDij--qEwIcYPz6fdAsJpEo7enRrvMLXrEcdLr1RhXnpZLqodN4hui9AK67PFvuvNq9YSAEiJ4_rlM_bF1ahHLEdNE_w%3D%3D)_******

**The only things the Democrats are delivering are inflation, recession, interest rate hikes, market volatility and drained IRAs.**

Don't count on this government to save you,

Count on yourself.

There is a [**wealth protection strategy**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f759b4874cf94285a0917c2e91a2bcc5&_e=owcauWMmSfaXtgBE-Z-l9d2zWMVbfd8zt35BL9tXbegWVYfneBabsTWWqK5j9XMtLygU7f6D1BdZAnsy6P0LtbyzmkYFFfmvgGXaQDyH-TCSN2FNQuUW3czAhHfxXd6V1Unmlz9A1IO18-EM3NLhkqtDbC4UwcoFbuNCBFCJfDrzHxhG2-onm8VmO5AnDUlfLLZoeiRMN9fmFu2uHtj1n_GFq5xIKGTH7vOvqE3T3loPcFj5ujgbQ1i6qfAtx-3gPXp784zeZxx1Cf-Y85ucvSchnxA-vn3GDh1YYLDYBXhDRDlQYizzJf0614fQKP4imh1xM-x9uLCGZdz7QybVToyLDgT5IfKKtarhTYNuk0pFMryXQ3G4AfuqlbjACDNAwbSEVZkl33InYrDHcvOY5rY2SrrSirTtEvP-uGripBn0wPMpqeA2VlYD-1LF_UQ_6M8jVaw-3176bK278Ic2QkGAhkSlCqnmYmGaarj2CWKsKQAqkeoOXJ82LR3xyUVw-1hyL1vc-pgiBMiDEB6nLQ%3D%3D) that can protect your retirement savings. clean_body: As 2022 draws to a close, we want to take a moment to say thank you for your support throughout the year. | | | | | Dear Peter, As 2022 draws to a close, we want to take a moment to say thank you for your support throughout the year. Whether you made a donation, volunteered your time, or made your voice heard by casting your vote, your generous actions helped make our Commonwealth stronger. = With your support this year, we elected Josh Shapiro as our new governor and John Fetterman as our new senator and said no to the extremism of the GOP. We are also so close to flipping the State House! Thanks to you, Pennsylvania is moving towards a brighter future – a future where Democrats work to build a stronger economy, protect reproductive choice, expand voting rights, and promote equality for all. We wish you and your loved ones a season of peace, health, and joy. Sincerely, Pennsylvania Democrats | | Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. = Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. With 2022 coming to an end, I hope you’re surrounded by your friends and family. This is a perfect time to look back at our incredible year and share what we’re thankful for.

Serving the people in New Jersey’s 12th Congressional District is the greatest honor of my life. I am humbled and honored to have earned your trust, and I’m so thankful for your consistent support.

Thank you for a great year and I look forward to what we can accomplish together in 2023!

Warmest wishes for a happy holiday season,

Bonnie

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Are You In God's Slingshot?
body:
God has a slingshot and often times we find oursleves in it and it can be confusing. Sunday, I preached a sermon on how Joseph in the Book of Genesis
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9348.1.25a4b3b6cd907d1476f4fe098df7d503)
---
God has a **slingshot** and often times we find oursleves in it and it can be _confusing_. Sunday, I preached a sermon on how **Joseph in the Book of Genesis** was inside [God's Slingshot](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9349.1.88f3bc41688415f7d9a3b0e4e9e84fd0). At 17 years of age, God gave Joseph a dream about his future. But his life was nothing but setback after setback. Joseph was thrown in a pit by his own brothers, sold as slave to Egypt, falsely accused of rape by Potiphar's wife and forgotten in an Egyptian prison. Joseph kept getting pulled back in [God's Slingshot](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9350.1.6b1434a1dab2e2cefb3f380078dfa419) but in Genesis 41 the release took place and he became the **Prime Minister** of the most powerful country on the planet in a moment. **Maybe the setbacks in your life are setups to propel you into the destiny that God has for you...** I want to encourage you to check out this message I preached on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9351.1.4d50d5fdce5e58f31d2c685d1efc9d2f) in Tulsa, Ok of how you can position yourself for a release! Watch [God's Slingshot](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9352.1.90fe2bd7efcfdaa822d5444f093f5019) here: [https://youtu.be/7Lu23yJFXFA](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9353.1.f1a3db0065e91fa79b6f6f39b737097b) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9354.1.7fe92d008d86e594c6d98cb1eadbbc8a), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9355.1.c0413d09b5896dd6dad9bedc5f4e78c2), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9356.1.15fca08dbdc0a3fdadb857d1ab2b55c3), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9357.1.8cfd9a87d217835e2321b22f8cfc0bd6), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9358.1.4d92dee45ec7650bef921568555e2634) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9359.1.3df24a53f1bc2ca0d5016f16f4f39daf)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9360.1.349cae090b6c3f5ac59e75fc54e8436a)
---
---
## Don't Miss Out!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9361.1.9f40b1dcfe6e4ca67448638c478dc371)
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that _"God helps those who help themselves"_ is a Bible verse.
In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never
In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9362.1.cf2e47b4aaa6d2588222844c48bc7b79).
I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9363.1.68e9cf03f4b407b15a86b71082e4a890) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple.
[Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9364.1.68e55072a756a9538da86f195b1502f8) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online.
_"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15**
Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9365.1.4c4f942a4a2f9eff92be665ee035bc34) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester.
**Fall Semester** :
\- Old Testament Introduction
\- New Testament Introduction
\- Theology of Worship
\- Church History 1
\- Faith & Prayer
\- Spiritual Growth
**Spring Semester** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach
Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9366.1.82b8e09a531523f72f990f93def1bfca)
| | [ Sheridan Bible College ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9367.1.15f9fc8b94e9a173c898784128975643)
