## Mike Lindell Needs Our Help!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9368.1.067c877c49cad9e48da049e04167444a)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9369.1.5094837b4e71fed96fe3205e77cf1657), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16181743.9370.1.39aaf06e36415ec1798fbf95d08dc548).

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Thank you for helping Republican candidates in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
You stepped up in a big way to help Senate Republicans this year, and I thank you. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61290938:slwoJbDcN:m:1:877327319:2FEF8CCED6246B79BBAEBC4C0716C551:r)
---
Fellow American,

Thank you.

In 2022, you helped us send almost $2 million in resources to Republican candidates like Herschel Walker, Ron Johnson, Marco Rubio, and Adam Laxalt.

While some of our candidates came up short, it wasn't because of your lack of generosity.

Late in the campaign, I asked you to help 6 key Senate races. Between those 6 races, we were able to send $1.8 million to help them at a critical stage in their campaigns.

Team Graham stepped up in a big way to help Senate Republicans this year, and I thank you. Your steadfast support was truly remarkable.

Fellow American, I will be focusing on the 2024 election cycle soon enough, and I hope you will be supportive again in the future. But for now, I just want to say THANK YOU!

I sincerely appreciate everything you've done for Team Graham and our conservative candidates.

All the best,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61290938:slwoJbDcN:m:1:877327319:2FEF8CCED6246B79BBAEBC4C0716C551:r)

Lindsey Graham

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61290938:slwoJbDcN:m:1:877327319:2FEF8CCED6246B79BBAEBC4C0716C551:r)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4680ce9bfad04847923ba471ab9b633a&_e=6SDCux_iPsVmR81ekPRgU4dmDcCQ_as7FpHfJcd8DWddzS8eHBE_3OLXNnfV0tsV8IdRIdgDttae6iV7XBSHjRlGtofL6Er2LgDeU0cskWTjM7s0s0qEUzw1IrPkCx9ITV1p1G9OszNtHCTrbMcx4-OPJhy9vIMcfpt5dpZGgvrn_Oozi5QNEJq5w16LqrGIOZHPJ6xhCBjfNnaU2DMDTT3hGRI8U2FwTCF8VZsavVHSHHM8tzNHQLlkQPu_TM1M) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4680ce9bfad04847923ba471ab9b633a&_e=6SDCux_iPsVmR81ekPRgU4dmDcCQ_as7FpHfJcd8DWddzS8eHBE_3OLXNnfV0tsV8IdRIdgDttae6iV7XBSHjRlGtofL6Er2LgDeU0cskWRjhBvvlfyyf3YYOGusUjgZ2wmgOLRBbkeiE6nuIw5FcQvBJz6q6xopj5xym0zxQjQ-KqIzDR6PDZeFjWm-vysSjLufvno_eo6wZiqoPU04vJFdoDAWF6KG-KI3oE716bN7sasgwCDf2hkpu0UIjftk) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4680ce9bfad04847923ba471ab9b633a&_e=6SDCux_iPsVmR81ekPRgU4dmDcCQ_as7FpHfJcd8DWddzS8eHBE_3OLXNnfV0tsV8IdRIdgDttae6iV7XBSHjRlGtofL6Er2LgDeU0cskWR-U3RrR-fLkPfMfTMtIcD9h3Yi5beGD9vOFS7AiQah3no08RNYJFkgP5FgampwUIRbhnM5qmAmnA6xbX2Y4XiT8oMnQLBhA1s14efYAX01CFeAxttzYxj0tXs4lFiDoStUIdOYWRXhOHtCZsgdvfdc) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' will play out - and what it means for your money. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4680ce9bfad04847923ba471ab9b633a&_e=6SDCux_iPsVmR81ekPRgU4dmDcCQ_as7FpHfJcd8DWddzS8eHBE_3OLXNnfV0tsV8IdRIdgDttae6iV7XBSHjRlGtofL6Er2LgDeU0cskWSGzKtFXL1VXa3K-MKW09oioOGcFENFCP9trb5I9t1qxI-yZX9tSfQw02dTQCGPlHXHOOn0u3kVmj5ySWVQ0DlfmWfzUdKm5J3S-AwUtjKH8ZMT1RycbG_nyv1btQAz0KfRIjM6IQCMKoDAm73iNmBZ) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Distortion Report Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peter, In about two weeks, Congress will be back in session, and my work fighting for the people of Illinois’ 17th District will officially begin. **I’m excited to get started, but we have one VERY important task ahead of us first. Just four days before my swearing-in will mark my first public FEC fundraising deadline as your Congressman-elect.** After this deadline hits, our quarterly fundraising numbers will go public. It’s so important that we kick off the new year showing strength, momentum, and grassroots support. Illinois’ 17th will still be one of the most competitive districts in the country, and early resources will be critical to protecting our progress and keeping this seat blue. So I need to ask: **[With less than ten days until our FEC deadline, will you help us kick off the new year with strength? We set a goal of raising $100,000 from online contributions, and your $5 will go a long way in helping us meet this mark.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzH0YL3mrf0VOPWbupHt_PYhzqSOpqKTw3TZTmqsYA0dsVv50KylR1WtgejFpA2iycciARrmYhMudQAFBcw_1xoiguXnwmJMjiQ22RyFVl8H-RLnt9GDhA014KkRoKOtc7EySN3bBOSF2skUCenZbAsbHRl0daS6Rwm8iu9eHKvdxDUBwoKY4eMsHqbKOwpbBKJzFXqVvzsUUbW7YWnDFNbBGeejbJpe45TN9TjBZlAUOr8hS7FA209DTyDHNL-yGk32vn8kFcKIlGX-zM14KFtw-PBG1T-YsD43-OojRHfieV0wm_LcnAhNMhSOR81hwNbdmVj-8jegjkegNUeVFpc_dIctFZzOfBMkJKtQs8wjIKApGPNxjy2SonkTfwycfrckC_t7rqqPbMG--e4-WVOsZWOPYIOiXSSqnrmYVd3uG/3s5/x4mDyBDfRCKY-PPwiwSqdQ/h1/QQ12agLiv_cYttRI27EHI2kdvfNIF_wez2p2vZE2j0Q)**

This year, your support helped me defeat a well-funded and dark money-supported Republican in Esther Joy King. That victory was due to the robust voter communication and get-out-the-vote programs we were able to run. And accomplishing that was only possible with grassroots donations. You put me here, Peter. Over the next two years, I’ll do everything I can to advocate on this district’s behalf. But in a toss-up district like ours, it’d be negligent not to begin preparing to defend this seat right away. After she was arrested last year in Florida, the Minnesota College Republicans severed ties with her. Now, 20-year-old Castro Medina has pleaded guilty to conspiring with 32-year-old Lazzaro to recruit and solicit six minors for prostitution.It was reported that the two had met on a website called “Seeking Arrangements.” A site that is used by men to solicit sexual relationships with younger women in exchange for money. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition to Congress: Pass the Environmental Justice for All Act
body:
Quick signature needed
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T624cfda0-4d14-47f8-81ad-7760fc035bfb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, Last year, Rep. Donald McEachin led a historic, unique legislative process with Rep. Raul M. Grijalva to ensure the priorities of people facing disproportionate negative impacts of the climate crisis and environmental injustices were incorporated into federal legislation. Frontline communities had a key [voice](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4df0ca8-fc67-40fd-bb28-3aa78dfd90dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in developing that legislation. The result: the **Environmental Justice for All Act (EJ for All), the most significant effort by the federal government to address generations of environmental racism**. [**Sign the petition: Demand Congress pass the Environmental Justice for All Act and immediately begin to address generations of environmental racism**.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac25fef7-8e76-4cc3-9886-eef1d659bd5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Environmental injustice is deeply rooted in American history. Black, brown, Indigenous, and low-income communities suffer vastly [disproportionate impacts](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62e4a1cb-9714-4fb5-86bd-4be5ff372c25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)from climate change and environmental hazards. The EJ for All Act paves the way for remedying a long history of environmental harm and racism and ensuring fair treatment.
---
| | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d6e09e3-f3c2-4a87-a84d-422e91d4814b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | The EJ for All Act would enable frontline communities to hold polluters accountable in court for projects that use federal funds and engage in environmental discrimination. It contains bold policies that will strengthen the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) to require federal agencies to consider the cumulative and disproportionate impacts of pollution on low-income communities and communities of color and would use new fees on oil, gas, and coal companies to fund investments in environmental justice communities. Sadly, Rep. McEachin passed away on November 29. But his critical work to address environmental racism [lives on](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48e06b22-8705-4e7d-ad58-c316e5b6d1f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and now Congress has the opportunity to ensure this vital legislation passes. Congress must pass the Environmental Justice for All Act! [**Sign the petition: Demand Congress pass the Environmental Justice for All Act and immediately begin to address generations of environmental racism**.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b559606-a04a-4d9c-8d11-5ed191397af3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T630bcd13-dd6a-4283-a19b-38710f083c81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you for being in this fight with us, Peter. Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5, $10, or $25 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend critical progressive causes.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d5bb457-a06a-4118-8d96-1358f3697051/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/petitionenvironmentaljusticeforallact-k?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61c2c6e3-0d1e-48e7-8fa8-bfae20235f54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=839ebb87-b7bd-4e92-a976-1eb3c75d606b&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=839ebb87-b7bd-4e92-a976-1eb3c75d606b&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lavern=20Spicer?=
subject: He just secured the nomination... YES!
body:
| | | Peter,My friend Leon Benjamin has just secured the nomination to run as the GOP candidate in the special election for Virginia’s 4th District. This is a critical race... as it is the one that will secure an even larger majority in the House of Representatives.This election wasn’t even expected. Rep. Don McEachin died unexpectedly right after his re-election and left this seat WIDE open for the taking. It was tough to beat McEachin, as he had been there forever... but now, with this being an open seat Pastor Leon Benjamin - a Navy combat veteran - can absolutely swing it for the GOP.
---
| [HELP LEON WIN THIS SEAT FOR THE GOP!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0b99f6fc65&e=fdefed58de)
---
Leon is running for Congress as a BLACK Conservative Republican... because he is sick of what the far Left has done to his community and to American families. **I know all about it because I did the same exact thing!** I know Leon and that’s why I **know** he has what it takes to win this race in this community. I’m ready to help him win and I need you all to help him.This race is on February 21, 2023... so it’s coming up. My brother Leon needs to come up with some MAJOR fundraising before the end of the year to make sure he can come into this race with a vengeance.He is the nominee. He won that nomination. Now he needs to win the seat.**Right now I need you to click one of those buttons below and DONATE TO LEON SO HE CAN WIN THIS SEAT! We need to increase our majority and do so in a major way. We can’t afford to hand another seat to the Left. Let’s make this an upset victory and start the 2024 cycle off with a REPUBLICAN SURPRISE!**
| [DONATE $20 TO LEON!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6af49c7105&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $50 TO LEON!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=879c03bf8c&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $100 TO LEON!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=481d886113&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE MORE TO LEON!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=556b24290b&e=fdefed58de)
---
I’m ready for Leon Benjamin to win. Leon is ready to serve. Let’s do it!Sincerely,Lavern Spicer
|

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: You’re critical to this battle
body:
The last few years—and the recent election—have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the

| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0tu5hhr93p72isichem06044nv8i104531jralo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clim6p70c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation's educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."

Today it may be less than that.

That's because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents' motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as "domestic terrorists."

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqnlb6n3fo0u1ol0u07fvm404kg204ejqbi2mlfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clim6p70c1h2bs)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and our newest course, "The Real American Founding: A Conversation." **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

As I've written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv783btdthudtgq6i9908vio7cas4bgsos9t3m4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clim6p70c1h2bs)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcrbgalvvblbeemrghp5bhrmfmn1ekuf4v6gi9cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clim6p70c1h2bs)**. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.

Please support the project today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmanfm08nmefmg5futuv5tpji60d0r3tadfk7img_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chimaor4s1g649fg)

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpntfbg08tn6h9p69du2kpn2bn68vhrlvu7tlq90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4climep76cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr3j7jfr7t4t4opob8k7bm8g085mqn1ue2aq46i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4climep76cdh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr7gqubd692dilf698av96jkot9mrtsnomfff6rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4climep76cdh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg23dlt2nk92cd40j3h0kgroug6pdodgqn2ojl20_rp22sh2s8i66pr4climep76cdh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

name: Great America Update
subject: You’re critical to this battle
body:
The last few years—and the recent election—have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the corruption of our nation’s educational system. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7516%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=LSsnDlHuHHkhKZkBx%2fVCUA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77499%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WhsUQOoHXdfRbkalv%2fWChw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation’s educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”

Today it may be less than that.

That’s because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents’ motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as “domestic terrorists.”

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale’s mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That’s why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77490%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6KGREpyDw5rXwPpc6n0vdQ&sysid=1)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,” “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” and our newest course, “The Real American Founding: A Conversation.” **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here’s why...

As I’ve written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77491%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1GdTciH2hKqJ2%2fiKrRrgQQ&sysid=1)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77492%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VC42iN2FZyIqEmTA4wmabQ&sysid=1)**. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.

Please support the project today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7516%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=LSsnDlHuHHkhKZkBx%2fVCUA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7516%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=LSsnDlHuHHkhKZkBx%2fVCUA&sysid=1)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: WATCH: My Message at AmericaFest
body:
THIS is how we learn from our McFailures.
| | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FQeIDcJoH9dFrpKa7Xx__HObsf56Tz74U-YRGIQpI2j0UqM7hygGc1Fqi9xKpsxQIaoUJSY-p1jF59ofZMhNZsPTH0gXHzZBfgOmVOAIqaT6xgvTPaJOYxZDNR_wQ7K42Z9noVw9hGdktiq9qdmhOpzFakl4tpP5QpD-0dnlQ_uUrklC4khbYBpVLnAgy45l__yp6tAMVOsVtNHAYyWR3w==&c=l40cxaP1ZhfXW80td9kDQLpUmrf4RavT1IGxu22GXK8UK_YvHB7_DA==&ch=fw-Jb6v18JmmeL4ClXMWr7q7yZPVCXkO0Yk0lWHPKB5KmKF0wdlp6Q==)
---
| Peter,
---
| This week, I had the pleasure of addressing the patriots at [Turning Point USA's AmericaFest](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FQeIDcJoH9dFrpKa7Xx__HObsf56Tz74U-YRGIQpI2j0UqM7hygGc1Fqi9xKpsxQIaoUJSY-p1jF59ofZMhNZsPTH0gXHzZBfgOmVOAIqaT6xgvTPaJOYxZDNR_wQ7K42Z9noVw9hGdktiq9qdmhOpzFakl4tpP5QpD-0dnlQ_uUrklC4khbYBpVLnAgy45l__yp6tAMVOsVtNHAYyWR3w==&c=l40cxaP1ZhfXW80td9kDQLpUmrf4RavT1IGxu22GXK8UK_YvHB7_DA==&ch=fw-Jb6v18JmmeL4ClXMWr7q7yZPVCXkO0Yk0lWHPKB5KmKF0wdlp6Q==) to talk about how we can begin to fix the disastrous showing for our party in the November midterms.
Hint: It's not swapping out our bold America First message for more Liz Cheney!
I spoke on the tactics we should use... And the leaders who we should REPLACE.
Watch my speech in full below, and share this email with a friend so we can spread our message far and wide - let's show the Establishment RINOs that controlled opposition just isn't going to cut it anymore!!!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FQeIDcJoH9dFrpKa7Xx__HObsf56Tz74U-YRGIQpI2j0UqM7hygGc1Fqi9xKpsxQIaoUJSY-p1jF59ofZMhNZsPTH0gXHzZBfgOmVOAIqaT6xgvTPaJOYxZDNR_wQ7K42Z9noVw9hGdktiq9qdmhOpzFakl4tpP5QpD-0dnlQ_uUrklC4khbYBpVLnAgy45l__yp6tAMVOsVtNHAYyWR3w==&c=l40cxaP1ZhfXW80td9kDQLpUmrf4RavT1IGxu22GXK8UK_YvHB7_DA==&ch=fw-Jb6v18JmmeL4ClXMWr7q7yZPVCXkO0Yk0lWHPKB5KmKF0wdlp6Q==)
---
| | [HELP ME FIGHT FOR THIS VISION >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FQeIDcJoH9dFrpKa7Xx__HObsf56Tz74U-YRGIQpI2j0UqM7hygGc1Fqi9xKpsxQIaoUJSY-p1jF59ofZMhNZsPTH0gXHzZBfgOmVOAIqaT6xgvTPaJOYxZDNR_wQ7K42Z9noVw9hGdktiq9qdmhOpzFakl4tpP5QpD-0dnlQ_uUrklC4khbYBpVLnAgy45l__yp6tAMVOsVtNHAYyWR3w==&c=l40cxaP1ZhfXW80td9kDQLpUmrf4RavT1IGxu22GXK8UK_YvHB7_DA==&ch=fw-Jb6v18JmmeL4ClXMWr7q7yZPVCXkO0Yk0lWHPKB5KmKF0wdlp6Q==)
---
| It's pretty simple, Peter.
Saving our republic at this urgent time - when the FBI has entire teams of people working with Big Tech to control what you see and how you behave - means learning from our McFailures.
It means making America more like Florida, where we fixed our election process (and where if you're STILL wearing a mask, we just assume you're hideous...).
And it means NOT getting behind lobbyist-owned leaders who believe in NOTHING!
Because I know that there ARE still important things that our movement believes in, from stopping the invasion at our Southern Border to ending Forever Wars that rob us of our treasure and bravest patriots.
I'd be honored if you stand by my side and help me fight for what we believe.
[FIGHT WITH GAETZ! ->](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FQeIDcJoH9dFrpKa7Xx__HObsf56Tz74U-YRGIQpI2j0UqM7hygGc1Fqi9xKpsxQIaoUJSY-p1jF59ofZMhNZsPTH0gXHzZBfgOmVOAIqaT6xgvTPaJOYxZDNR_wQ7K42Z9noVw9hGdktiq9qdmhOpzFakl4tpP5QpD-0dnlQ_uUrklC4khbYBpVLnAgy45l__yp6tAMVOsVtNHAYyWR3w==&c=l40cxaP1ZhfXW80td9kDQLpUmrf4RavT1IGxu22GXK8UK_YvHB7_DA==&ch=fw-Jb6v18JmmeL4ClXMWr7q7yZPVCXkO0Yk0lWHPKB5KmKF0wdlp6Q==)

Let's go get 'em!!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FQeIDcJoH9dFrpKa7Xx__HObsf56Tz74U-YRGIQpI2j0UqM7hygGc1Fqi9xKpsxQIaoUJSY-p1jF59ofZMhNZsPTH0gXHzZBfgOmVOAIqaT6xgvTPaJOYxZDNR_wQ7K42Z9noVw9hGdktiq9qdmhOpzFakl4tpP5QpD-0dnlQ_uUrklC4khbYBpVLnAgy45l__yp6tAMVOsVtNHAYyWR3w==&c=l40cxaP1ZhfXW80td9kDQLpUmrf4RavT1IGxu22GXK8UK_YvHB7_DA==&ch=fw-Jb6v18JmmeL4ClXMWr7q7yZPVCXkO0Yk0lWHPKB5KmKF0wdlp6Q==)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=493c52d38fd94940ad7967a34a61980a&_e=LGIwvJxU4JqeO1_vwB2YjlkdcSZUy2QxcD5mELGvhfqj8_vQQe9UYqyOhpx2BuqZohx5vQu0quf5LV-v5Hb2zvHt05Q_P5UNaAwNYXuNB2TWIrFDPusf2ER_PuW4b07tkVvu76egy8t4m0aZHtUs3cnpAeb20-aXU5EydYsHIKGXJ9xMkPayWlnD7SYWO_gVp2AdUA6biYlFKV05lH6DgKKeKi3GewAGaz1aB3KHK7Qw1tGI3ZXLl8whm29amVRX) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=493c52d38fd94940ad7967a34a61980a&_e=LGIwvJxU4JqeO1_vwB2YjlkdcSZUy2QxcD5mELGvhfqj8_vQQe9UYqyOhpx2BuqZohx5vQu0quf5LV-v5Hb2zvHt05Q_P5UNaAwNYXuNB2RMgr-jQNcVArMvFcgn67DvpUXblWYKs8kOjYAgN35u3qijvlg4FBQAPaqCIz4wJ9L1l7fraNMpqXiQDczVlfMqFhYtutoCdeWTZKup0odXCRnEj5uJVtAsdyOUqQ6yWDqGHwcZ6iuqJciz-7HdZNIJ) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=493c52d38fd94940ad7967a34a61980a&_e=LGIwvJxU4JqeO1_vwB2YjlkdcSZUy2QxcD5mELGvhfqj8_vQQe9UYqyOhpx2BuqZohx5vQu0quf5LV-v5Hb2zvHt05Q_P5UNaAwNYXuNB2SmwMABsSYokW7UmPj7sLbkWBFz31-2BPaOfzqeZlG0pysbt_Kb4o-gQTYT_ddPbMeDp07EUdgb3FBWtMZzDNlkk9pyNC0Km7xDhUbs5b0BG0sRgYg5T-S7c6bTtJYSp9MHkt6aAzNmXK7boxlwDZV4) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' will play out - and what it means for your money. ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=493c52d38fd94940ad7967a34a61980a&_e=LGIwvJxU4JqeO1_vwB2YjlkdcSZUy2QxcD5mELGvhfqj8_vQQe9UYqyOhpx2BuqZohx5vQu0quf5LV-v5Hb2zvHt05Q_P5UNaAwNYXuNB2TkMJDWJlbMBNrVaHcP59VUwrVvmFKtgpM5-MlafKbCe2T8vWSLFt09lks_k3eQsogj7t6MBtxNpvqNFtqe9HShnx627QLHLTxAI2JR7Qni21WopVOW7d1_pSqd3Sy3-fNYaBUgvQTtECYJZRM8OKD0) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_

body:
Our southern border is a raging fire of cartel-driven human tracking and drug smuggling. And, once again, Congress is ignoring the human suffering on the border to spend its time on a disastrous amnesty proposal that only adds fuel to the fire! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0229%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=yHhbrbfmYZvPxACwWcUZGQ&sysid=1)

name: ICYMI News
subject: You’re critical to this battle
body:
The last few years—and the recent election—have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0v87qcpi6gja5vfchu7hjbi0ndsjt0881osr3lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm2or6cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation's educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."

Today it may be less than that.

That's because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents' motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as "domestic terrorists."

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrlibnraupv9v1h046dsgj3u9vmb3mh9sgejuf1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm2or6cdh2bs)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and our newest course, "The Real American Founding: A Conversation." **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

As I've written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk0iorbj2a96ju6i6n5tl5und19hrt79j6ht6joo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm2or6cdh2bs)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziqmftnb1avkcqvbddn7halv8gu5tr1thaclolm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm2or6cdh2bs)**. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans.

Please support the project today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

body:
Our southern border is a raging fire of cartel-driven human tracking and drug smuggling.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr392jhpfprvag4ea9e6l0ebjevh6lug5d1u3mi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm4p36c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onicprj3cr46uq6codlcap6bc35emo70sr36lrb7dlnmepbbctjc5gnatj569ob0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccbkmdi3fcjicoob5cr2cuobapbi4no)
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zslmgqkg4pdc5mkut57626gmld6f86604pijb1j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm4p36c5h2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Our southern border is a raging fire of cartel-driven human tracking and drug smuggling. And, once again, **Congress is ignoring the human suffering on the border to spend its time on a**** _disastrous_****amnesty proposal that only adds fuel to the fire!**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6mcn1djsglini7k7uq1gb3oouoft0aol0vcgqc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm4p36c5h2bs)
---
| | Under the smoke screen of “bipartisanship,” Sens. Tillis and Sinema have agreed to a so-called “immigration reform” framework that would grant amnesty to **TWO MILLION** illegal aliens.** ** Here at Heritage Action, we’re leading the fight in Washington to **_ensure_****this amnesty deal is derailed,** but it means nothing without thousands of conservative activists backing our fight. Your donation will be used for grassroots education and letter campaigns to members of Congress encouraging them to oppose this terrible amnesty deal. **[_Fellow Conservative, tell Congress NO AMNESTY by making a grassroots contribution now >>_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvout2buuv0k3v463fi1rikjd3ek43tdfv2tr1h8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm4p36c5h2bs)**
---
| | [**SAY NO TO AMNESTY >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcc0r6r5ve8lp03v6sjn3rkkmgnkt4q2sdfdu4u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm4p36c5h2bs)
---
| | Granting amnesty would be a virtual free pass to millions who have not been fully processed. Even worse, it would only encourage _millions more_ to rush to the border and join other so-called asylum seekers. **Fellow Conservative, we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help us prevent this disastrous framework from becoming a reality.** **[_Can we count on your IMMEDIATE support? >>_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgk8h6fg2hnpkmbu2525oo74tptvvc40ocanks48_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm4p36c5h2bs)**
---

clean_body: Our southern border is a raging fire of cartel-driven human tracking and drug smuggling. | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Our southern border is a raging fire of cartel-driven human tracking and drug smuggling. And, once again, Congress is ignoring the human suffering on the border to spend its time on a disastrousamnesty proposal that only adds fuel to the fire! | | | | Under the smoke screen of “bipartisanship,” Sens. Tillis and Sinema have agreed to a so-called “immigration reform” framework that would grant amnesty to TWO MILLION illegal aliens. Here at Heritage Action, we’re leading the fight in Washington to ensurethis amnesty deal is derailed, but it means nothing without thousands of conservative activists backing our fight. Your donation will be used for grassroots education and letter campaigns to members of Congress encouraging them to oppose this terrible amnesty deal. | | | | Granting amnesty would be a virtual free pass to millions who have not been fully processed. Even worse, it would only encourage millions more to rush to the border and join other so-called asylum seekers. Fellow Conservative, we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help us prevent this disastrous framework from becoming a reality. | | | | Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive DirectorHeritage Action for America | | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo7nub46h27sjmqvomujbkmc9eebrlgq5gapv7b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm6ob4clh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjbksqo4v9ofu195b3iptn7sqebfnc25d7ushbv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm6ob4clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcm11m2s6u8bs4h6ct39pt5un80tk9a0j7pii9u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm6ob4clh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9mnlri5nhjil9dmdvae4r7pugp98t8oo6d1p4s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm6ob4clh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zf9bfjiihemnuj0nf7587bmlbjsueqfmgne4vp0g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsof6rkqtgtorp1btcvare8i2lk8iph3jvuac64g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm6ob4c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr9l3eesqeu94p6biejuh0m4o4nije2bc5t6p9c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm6ob4c5h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zddg6ap2geunjoh0ic5qglv5r8jr4h7optn7pemo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm6ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhkf9rendohe7taub9tji5vv1t0avjtog22ist50_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clhm6ob4c5h2bs)**
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

And you can reserve your copy using this secure link: By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum. | | | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying “The David Story.” Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of “The David Story” while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Here’s the truth...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
December is the final FEC deadline month of the year.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign. I know we just finished a big push in November, but please — give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here’s the truth:
December is an official FEC deadline month. What that means is, when it’s over, we’re legally required to report how much money we raised AND the total number of donations we received online.
It’s hard to believe, but National Republicans are already gearing up to roll back all the work we’ve done over the last two years.
We’re still in this fight, we’re still working, and before everyone takes a much needed break before the holidays we need the peace of mind that we’ll reach our goal. That’s why I’m asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution today? Every donation counts, no matter how small, and we need a lot to get us where we need to be before we’re legally required to release our numbers.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec22.rUmYtQ&refcode=em221220-1-7&t=1&akid=4848%2E6688874%2EoyJ8D_)

| | Under the smoke screen of “bipartisanship,” Sens. | | | Peter, From the day I took office, I’ve been warning America about big tech.

And now, as Twitter’s veil is being lifted, we’re seeing JUST how dangerous far-Left big tech leaders are.

Twitter censored conservatives, prevented users from seeing trending topics, and blacklisted accounts of prominent conservatives - _all in secret._

Make no mistake, Peter: this is a coordinated effort to help Democrat ideas win the battle of public opinion.

The veil may be off Twitter, but other big tech platforms are still censoring conservatives in silence.

Our work in 2022 paid off in a big way — proving beyond a doubt how much potential our organizing has to end the Commonwealth’s underrepresentation crisis and reshape its political alignment.

So in 2023, we’re excited to announce, we’re **doubling** our staff, and expanding our operations to Philadelphia! As Pennsylvania’s biggest stronghold of young, immigrant, and Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color, this is a huge opportunity to make an even bigger impact in 2023 _**and 2024.**_

clean_body: We’re expanding to better expand the electorate. = | = = The time has come to make some major expansions to the New Pennsylvania Project. Our work in 2022 paid off in a big way — proving beyond a doubt how much potential our organizing has to end the Commonwealth’s underrepresentation crisis and reshape its political alignment. So in 2023, we’re excited to announce, we’re doubling our staff, and expanding our operations to Philadelphia! As Pennsylvania’s biggest stronghold of young, immigrant, and Black, Indigenous, and other communities of color, this is a huge opportunity to make an even bigger impact in 2023 and 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 16, 2023 Last day to : May 1, 2023 Last day to : May 9, 2023 GENERAL: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. My name is Jennifer McClellan and I’m running to represent Virginia’s Fourth District in a last-minute primary that is today.

I have dedicated my life to serving the people of Virginia and ensuring that all Virginians have their voices heard through our government. I’ve served the greater Richmond area for 17 years in the state legislature, and now it’s time to take this fight to Congress.

But I’ll cut to the chase: our special election primary is today, and we’ve got to sprint through the tape. [I’ll explain more in a moment but if you’re ready to help now, please rush a $10 donation (or more!) to help us hit today’s $10,000 goal.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZXPgLcBL3GIJTmcYPZceb-15B2yno6HfTmW5vI-qtZBBrpXTSTW3M35W5uhxCz-PGSqqgU-0fP3DNr2iYkrxyRi7mZu7q_DVC3WFqBBXvI3fj7B6arSHHxYo9nnd-MeL5LhoHyjJzwp-knGA5qTxFmkmWhcVjx2I6QJ0UynNxmb2npnsrYvCis6Ra2FXx6klSmBjKenmQXPahnjH6Q6Psr0mSi4z5LwP-cw9ZhJb6Xww1ZV9t6avJbge4jinh3_X2qQ3nflXCXQ1cvZRbvCebsg/3s5/9D0OojrFTt-jS3CHbkaVPg/h2/Np3s2RyTRiPCNmeKWvMmecGsIOzCiY0lZnA3LVM-0zg) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Jennifer McClellan and The Collective PAC.

When the new Congress is sworn in, Republicans will hold a razor-thin majority. We can’t let them pick up a _single_ seat.

My team has a plan to win. We’re getting ads on TV and making sure Virginians know that I’ll _always_ have their backs. But advertising is expensive. We’ve done the math and we need to raise $10,000 today to put our path to victory into motion.

[We’ve still got about $7,374 to go and while I certainly don’t expect you to cover all of it, I’d be really grateful if you could chip in $10. name: Giffords PAC
subject: $1. Yes, just $1.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If everyone does their part and pitches in $1 when they can, it makes a difference.
#

Friends -
We are writing to humbly ask if you can make a $1 donation to Giffords PAC today. Yes, just $1.
$1 to help us reach our end of year fundraising goals and to start 2023 off strong.
$1 to help us continue our fight for commonsense gun safety legislation—like universal background checks—that will save lives.
$1 to help us deliver a message to our newly elected Congress that we are ready to hold them accountable to enact meaningful gun safety laws.
We know that $1 may not seem like enough to do all of this, but if everyone does their part and pitches in $1 when they can, it makes a difference.
[**Can you use this link to contribute $1, or whatever you can afford to Giffords PAC today? We will put it right to work in our fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221220-1-15&t=1&akid=2890%2E3935704%2EdhQbJB)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[CONTRIBUTE $1](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec22.xfoOYP&refcode=em221220-1-15&amount=1&t=2&akid=2890%2E3935704%2EdhQbJB)**
Thank you,
The team at Giffords PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2890%2E3935704%2EdhQbJB) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Hi Friend,
Carly here, Harriet's campaign manager. As you know Christmas is approaching! To celebrate I want supporters from all across Wyoming to add their names to Harriet's personal Christmas Card! Not only will she see your name, but you can also include a personal message! Can I count on you to sign Harriet’s card? It would mean the world to her. clean_body: | | | | We are waiting for you to sign her card | Hi Friend, Carly here, Harriet's campaign manager. As you know Christmas is approaching! To celebrate I want supporters from all across Wyoming to add their names to Harriet's personal Christmas Card! Not only will she see your name, but you can also include a personal message! Can I count on you to sign Harriet’s card? It would mean the world to her. | I know Harriet will love to see your name on her card. Please add your name and message to Harriet's Thank you, Carly | | | | |

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
1,456 is an important number to us.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221220-3724-header&t=1&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)
1,456.
That’s how many contributions we need to reach before the end of the month when we’ll close our books and submit our fundraising numbers to the public.
**How did we get 1,456?** Based on our average gift for the year ($15.90) and how much we’ve raised so far, we need to hit 8,000 contributions this month to match what we raised last month.
Here’s where we are so far:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221220-3724-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)
1,456 is an important number to us because each donation – **no matter the amount** – shows that our values, from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal, have strong support in your state and across the country.
[Can you be one of the 1,456 people we need to chip in this month to meet our goal and allow us to carry out all the programs Alexandria has planned?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221220-3724-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221220-3724-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)**
This goal is particularly important. On December 31, our numbers will be submitted to the FEC. Once they are made public, they will be examined by our opponents to determine the strength of this movement.
**Normally numbers tend to drop off after an election. We can’t let that happen.** The work we have to do is too great to only organize around elections.
Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress, whether it’s an election year or not. We know that next year will be no different, so it’s important that we raise resources early and demonstrate the strength of our campaign now.
Reaching 8,000 contributions and submitting a strong FEC report would demonstrate how much grassroots support Alexandria has beside her.
[Each donation we receive directly translates into growing our movement, so please – if you’re able – will you pitch in any amount to help us reach our goal?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202212.X77xwr&refcode=em20221220-3724-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)
Thank you for making all of this possible.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-202212?refcode=em20221220-3724-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=24&refcode2=3724_2526796__NS53Y&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221220-3724-P_FND_EOQ_GFM&t=25&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=3724%2E2526796%2E_NS53Y)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I have an update for you…
body:
I wanted to give you the latest update regarding my RICO lawsuit against Facebook, Twitter, Mark Zuckerberg, Jack Dorsey, and P&G to hold Big Tech accountable! | | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/H8iO8poDgqWOHyI763foWGpQ/V763s2u9Ul8927tucrI77wUK7w) | Dear Friend,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/H8iO8poDgqWOHyI763foWGpQ/V763s2u9Ul8927tucrI77wUK7w) I wanted to give you the latest update regarding my RICO lawsuit against Facebook, Twitter, Mark Zuckerberg, Jack Dorsey, and P&G to hold Big Tech accountable!

Both Facebook and Twitter have tried every angle to get my RICO case dismissed, but once again, we've filed an opposition to their motion, and I know my case will proceed.

As Elon Musk continues to release new batches of Twitter Files, every new release further proves what my case has alleged all along - Big Tech has been weaponized by the Left to ban conservative political speech, and it has been used by our Federal Government and the FBI to illegally interfere in U.S. elections.

Over the weekend, the most recent batch of released Twitter Files proved the FBI's collusion with Twitter to interfere with our elections!

My opposition to their motion to dismiss my historic RICO case is just the next step to prove it all in court and hold Big Tech's criminal enterprise accountable.

Unfortunately, the court system works slowly by default, and taking on Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and P&G is even more tedious and costly. With every new motion filed, it creates even more legal fees for me and my team. [I need your crucial help today to keep this legal fight going!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/H8iO8poDgqWOHyI763foWGpQ/V763s2u9Ul8927tucrI77wUK7w)

I will keep fighting through every motion to dismiss, or any other ploy the Big Tech Mafia may throw our way.

[Please donate today so we can hold Big Tech accountable for their political censorship and election interference](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/H8iO8poDgqWOHyI763foWGpQ/V763s2u9Ul8927tucrI77wUK7w) - or they'll do it all over again as we head into the 2024 elections!

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. In case you didn't hear, my Twitter account was reinstated last week!! [Follow me on Twitter here!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/1054mtFharuA5r9CDCMz2Q/V763s2u9Ul8927tucrI77wUK7w)

| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhmhv43unpr8e8hl1a338bllc59oh79rs87m6r3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljm8o71c5h2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdjqh5cojm0rm4to1oqb9m61ta7ivllei1lk3kro_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljm8o71c5h2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq0t2bl5hst6kkb31regc9usqvc9pi8s647u91oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljm8o71c5h2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs966f283rf43nvh7pnsl14u3jhr6tmr4nirhcg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljm8o71c5h2bs)**

This is serious: the Liberal Mob is rushing to collect hundreds of thousands of signatures to remove our beloved Conservative Supreme Court justice and REPLACE her with a Liberal activist appointed by Joe Biden! But it gets even worse: Big Democrat names are now calling her nomination “illegitimate” laying the groundwork for EXPELLING her! Trust us, the Liberal Mob isn’t wasting a second. They’re gaining lots -- possibly thousands -- of new supporters every single day. Thank you, Breaking Supreme Court Update Sent via Team Scalise To see our original communication to you about this crisis, read the following message: Forwarded Message: Amy Coney Barrett forced off the Supreme Court bench?? INTERCEPTED: The Far-Left’s petition to impeach beloved Conservative Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett! Far-Left Democrats have almost reached their goal -- we have to move NOW. This story is developing in real time. Democrats were FURIOUS when Republicans appointed Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. They knew she would stand up for our Pro-Life values, 2nd Amendment Rights, and religious freedoms. Now, Democrats are trying any desperate attempt to force Amy Coney Barrett off the court and replace her with a Far-Left Radical! If Democrats take control of the Supreme Court, they’ll destroy our Conservative legacy in the blink of an eye. We can’t let them get away with sidelining one of our best Supreme Court Justices. name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Oppose Democrat Spending Bill
body:
Do NOT support the Democrat Spending Bill U.S. Senate Republicans have shocked citizens around the nation by revealing they plan to support and pass the Pelosi-Schumer Spending Bill. In a despera | |
---

| | | Do NOT support the Democrat Spending Bill |
---|---|---
| U.S. Senate Republicans have shocked citizens around the nation by revealing they plan to support and pass the Pelosi-Schumer Spending Bill. In a desperate move before the Democrats lose control of the House of Representatives in January, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have convinced some Senate Republicans to pass a $1.7 trillion omnibus spending bill this week. [Send Senators Wicker and Hyde-Smith a Message](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Campaigns/99474/Respond)The weak spinless Republicans in the U.S. Senate, led by Mitch McConnell, have indicated they are in favor of allowing the democrats their last opportunity to spend your money to promote their "woke" agenda. Doing this would be a significant help to Biden and hinder House Republicans who are hoping to reverse some of the damage done to our nation by Biden and his clan of socialists.Thirteen conservative House Republicans have sent a letter to the Senate Republicans warning,
> “...we are obliged to inform you that if any omnibus passes in the remaining days of this Congress, we will oppose and whip opposition to any legislative priority of those senators who vote for this bill – including the... leader.”
Conservatives in congress need your help. Join us by sending a letter to Mississippi Senators Roger Wicker and Cindy Hyde-Smith demanding they stand with the conservatives and refuse to vote for the Democrat's spending bill.[**Send Your Message to Mississippi's Senators**](https://www.votervoice.net/MSFreedomCaucus/Campaigns/99474/Respond) |
|

Canceling student debt means:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Do you want to run for office?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Sign up and let us know - and then join us at one of our campaign school events

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: ***McGuire Press Release***
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
McGuire Introduces Legislation to Cut Taxes for All Virginia Veterans
---
| | | | | |
---
|

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE December 20th, 2022
McGuire Introduces Legislation to Cut Taxes for All Virginia Veterans
RICHMOND, VA - Today, Delegate John McGuire announced new legislation House Bill 1436 that will eliminate the age 55 requirement for veterans to receive tax reduction on their retirement pay. Passage of this legislation would ensure veterans will see a tax cut on their retirement pay the day after their retirement putting more money back into the pockets of those who have served our country. "As a Navy SEAL and now member of the Virginia House of Delegates, I was honored to successfully carry HB1128 in 2022, a bill to reduce taxes on veteran retirement pay up to $40k. This success is nearly 30 years in the making, but there is more we must do for our veterans. I am now fighting to remove the age 55 requirement put on my bill, and I am happy Governor Youngkin put the money to do just that in the budget!" said Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10.
You can find the legislation and read the bill text [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00128tQvMlY7bA8rKsuzCtlMNOd_2My5lquV2CrquPq8mAD-rSaL4x52uW6BK2axCimg-T7NN4HM-vOHqsyGujBJB_Z2YetAhTdgSfVSxsmSLbjSB6dg2A52BnDSANQq0Wso-ToUfxzQ2aqI10M5tSxo_qmBLB23gROlbu4afYJX6B4y5jrZYNYHdZbfjbSULehQ_zAsNOR_9g=&c=LNjWWker2AC91Lg0WirkcmPqbJt-68vFntEzWHRiUbk70Tm0W5y22Q==&ch=rcrIN0P7R-MyWzXiewGNfJkojD4ZMKvYOi2Au7lvXtXF9z1hN1XKCw==). ###
Contact: [Press@mcguireforvirginia.com](mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com)

---|---
|

Hanover

Louisa
Fluvanna

| Our country is hanging by a string. To win, it is vital that fellow Republicans put differences aside and unite. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
