clean_body: McGuire Introduces Legislation to Cut Taxes for All Virginia Veterans | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE December 20th, 2022 McGuire Introduces Legislation to Cut Taxes for All Virginia Veterans RICHMOND, VA - Today, Delegate John McGuire announced new legislation House Bill 1436 that will eliminate the age 55 requirement for veterans to receive tax reduction on their retirement pay. Passage of this legislation would ensure veterans will see a tax cut on their retirement pay the day after their retirement putting more money back into the pockets of those who have served our country. "As a Navy SEAL and now member of the Virginia House of Delegates, I was honored to successfully carry HB1128 in 2022, a bill to reduce taxes on veteran retirement pay up to $40k. This success is nearly 30 years in the making, but there is more we must do for our veterans. I am now fighting to remove the age 55 requirement put on my bill, and I am happy Governor Youngkin put the money to do just that in the budget!" said Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10. You can find the legislation and read the bill text ==. ### Contact: mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com | | | ---|--- | Senate District 10 Counties: Hanover Powhatan Louisa Fluvanna Goochland Buckingham Appomattox Amelia Prince Edward Cumberland | Our country is hanging by a string. To win, it is vital that fellow Republicans put differences aside and unite. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | | == | == | == == == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

body:
This pro-life dad was targeted by the FBI — and now he’s making his voice heard >>>
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvf440srgulru9m992ttinahdo8jccicnceojao0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmcor4chh2bs)
---
Friend, You've heard the story of Mark Houck, the pro-life father the FBI arrested at gunpoint. _But this story has a new twist that you may not have heard._ Now, he's taking the fight to the DOJ by accusing them of viewpoint discrimination and selective prosecution — and he's right to do so.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zro0adtk9unc8h9jmad4f2vncjau55fmltnfqeno_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmcor4chh2bs)
---
Friend, it's not enough for us to cobble together legal defense funds for conservatives who are the victims of politicized law enforcement agencies. **We have to go on offense.** **It's time to fight the root problem:_[the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8a8vrln5gs02mt5t7okcs9a0d73q1tdfv0d86t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmcor4chh2bs)_**
---
| | **_Are you ready to go on offense against the liberal activists who have infiltrated our judicial system?_**
---
| | [YES](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkva19a50rbthc2oq3tjckutmi1boqfcj1lf1m2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmcor4chh2bs)
---
| [NO](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1jaqffes20gsaq5ldfg06moo34oommbgvja3rlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmcor4chh2bs)
---
| | As a well-informed conservative, you’ve heard of judicial activism before — but too many people think of it as something that happens only at the level of the Supreme Court. Friend, that’s simply not true. It happens at EVERY level of the judiciary. And that’s why**Fair Courts America** exists. **Our mission is to fight back against the woke mob’s takeover of our judicial system, from the Supreme Court to your local prosecutor. ** So when the Pennsylvania Supreme Court decides to amend the state constitution by decree and change how elections are run, __we’re there to fight back._ _ When liberal prosecutors in red states decide to thwart the will of the people by declaring they will decline to enforce pro-life legislation, __we won’t let them get away with it.__ And when the Left tries to pack the Supreme Court,____we won’t let them change the rules of our republic.__
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdeqdhqmfg1o6je3vomiqarhc27tsdnp16ps9d3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmcor4chh2bs)
---
Tracking these races across the country is a massive undertaking — but it is absolutely critical to protecting our republic. **_[Friend, we need your help. Any amount you can give will support our efforts to defend the rule of law in our country. The woke mob is advancing on our courts right now, and only one thing can stop them from total takeover: YOU.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztdl3vi10t74m5pnrb3gfmksaov9qfafkck82o30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmcor4chh2bs)_**
---

---
In justice,Fair Courts America

name: Team DNC
subject: An update from the DNC’s Communications Team:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We’re putting communications staff on the ground ahead of the presidential election cycle earlier than ever before, and we couldn’t do it without the support of this grassroots team. | |
---
As Communications Director of the DNC, part of my job is to effectively deliver Democrats’ message and hold Republicans accountable. And if there’s one thing I’ve learned from this year’s midterm elections, it’s this, Derek: _Many Republicans lost in the midterms because of their extreme MAGA agenda._ We are already laying the groundwork to continue to hold them accountable for that agenda over the next two years. To do so, we’re launching a new embed program to get experienced communications staff on the ground in key states to drive local press coverage and hold Republicans up and down the ticket accountable ahead of what will be their messy and crowded 2024 GOP primaries. **This is the _earliest_ the DNC has put communications staff on the ground in a presidential election cycle, and we can only keep it up because of grassroots investments from folks like you. If you can, chip in $7 or any amount that is meaningful to you to continue powering our work into 2023 and beyond: **

This programming builds on the model of early investments in communications staff, regular messaging briefings, and toolkits for state parties to lift up voices and define Democratic accomplishments that we used to drive local press in 2020 and, more recently, in this year’s midterms. From putting up digital ads and billboards and advertising on radio, print, and TV to hosting events with state and local leaders and even launching a bus tour to spread our message far and wide, the common denominator behind our success has been the early investment of this grassroots team. **As we look ahead to 2023 and beyond, we have to do two things:** First, we must continue to get Democrats’ message to as many voters as possible, and second, we must keep holding the GOP accountable for their extreme MAGA agenda and trying to take away our most fundamental rights. This work requires the backing of grassroots supporters like you. **[So, will you take a minute and pitch in $7 to the DNC today? You’ll help get our message out across the nation and hold Republicans at all levels accountable as we head into the new year.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJ3oDEPNIBpOo7uCgwnD2SG7oQTsrfBePTpoPiouTmSq_IP4akitj44l9Ns0S7fOumJvVsbFv0OKn4qL9ujldgPeauFd9XRD4YnutAHCWaIoFm6DJzUvdrmulUCbJRq6nLrX0YVKypRSFOhu1m35n3J8e294KMdaCw65dy5XrO4J9tuq-nGgTZ78nP1BS4tIlNrYhbzbkMnGdw4I2tH905nJniaUelzrAmOdoXcvnSEf9iB4poZJJ0XHuFjeB26t-ZCAPaT5WB4P2JmI0VOeVw5Kdq696vuiM4CMw4CFUjMfbI05Ysxe5HOf7tFFU-vkOIbvtKUOwQBG2JNR8EMg8D3MsQEDrhBzb-vs7Eni6_XwzyLrPU1oeY9PNvXu_XLZv3YhYZZb41jpQP6GUw2zt1RZjogSGoOwYJSKHs3Y_YZxLmSDOMKyVe6eFhiDtiIUkrH3y8kqXL2gdZF-xaTje75qby1aQ7bh-56_ZlA1g5vyKpgj0gaMbYMuIOt4WapPtIiJNibsxhcY48wKIiPy7fs_-iAMO8TUHrwvYlhyfthmMyNRrKgjWbRImgpUo3FcHbvQlXL1JrM6x5ItR4NXVMWg/3s5/N2NVkdNpQDacWTs-xITiBw/h6/rMJATyT6bWhL1cG9fwJN8wRkK3xbeqg5zKdIH1ni9OM)** Thank you, KO Kristen Orthman

clean_body: We’re putting communications staff on the ground ahead of the presidential election cycle earlier than ever before, and we couldn’t do it without the support of this grassroots team. | | As Communications Director of the DNC, part of my job is to effectively deliver Democrats’ message and hold Republicans accountable. And if there’s one thing I’ve learned from this year’s midterm elections, it’s this, Derek: Many Republicans lost in the midterms because of their extreme MAGA agenda. We are already laying the groundwork to continue to hold them accountable for that agenda over the next two years. To do so, we’re launching a new embed program to get experienced communications staff on the ground in key states to drive local press coverage and hold Republicans up and down the ticket accountable ahead of what will be their messy and crowded 2024 GOP primaries. This is the earliest the DNC has put communications staff on the ground in a presidential election cycle, and we can only keep it up because of grassroots investments from folks like you. If you can, chip in $7 or any amount that is meaningful to you to continue powering our work into 2023 and beyond: This programming builds on the model of early investments in communications staff, regular messaging briefings, and toolkits for state parties to lift up voices and define Democratic accomplishments that we used to drive local press in 2020 and, more recently, in this year’s midterms. From putting up digital ads and billboards and advertising on radio, print, and TV to hosting events with state and local leaders and even launching a bus tour to spread our message far and wide, the common denominator behind our success has been the early investment of this grassroots team. As we look ahead to 2023 and beyond, we have to do two things: First, we must continue to get Democrats’ message to as many voters as possible, and second, we must keep holding the GOP accountable for their extreme MAGA agenda and trying to take away our most fundamental rights. This work requires the backing of grassroots supporters like you. Thank you, KO Kristen Orthman Communications Director Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise
subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqmtrffrpc4pidb9dsf8o9ioc9j34qno4gftfvg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljm2pb6cdh2bs)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zidqhq0uab1es7jp4ckoaq3gb6k0aggkt2va1dv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljm2pb6cdh2bs) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z86f0hhankjpbbqmcqvd5g4rletd1pdst49161g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljm2pb6cdh2bs) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbuknfk0qd71m0flqe6n4inhdiu75stbashmhi7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljm2pb6cdh2bs)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

name: Peter Welch
subject: The importance of this grassroots movement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We didn't build this campaign simply to win my race — we built it to deliver real change for those who need it most.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1227%2E61531%2EZV-Aby)
Happy holidays, friends!
Before I go any further, I want to acknowledge that I know you’ve gotten a lot of requests to donate this year.
For starters, we just won a 6-year term to the U.S. Senate, and that term hasn’t even begun yet. I know most folks will spend the next few weeks regrouping and recharging for the fight ahead, and I plan to do a little of that as well.
But there’s a saying I’m fond of: **Stay ready so you don’t have to get ready.** These fights over our democracy did not stop once the midterms ended — the next few years in Congress will be one fight after another. And given how the GOP underperformed expectations this year, you can guarantee that they’re eager to turn the tide now that they’ll have a slim majority in the House.
I know that the holidays are a time to spend with family, not checking your email. So I’m asking you to make a donation ahead of our end-of-year FEC deadline now so you won’t hear from me much in the days ahead.
I believe it’s important to keep the lights on and keep this team together, ready for whatever comes next — whether it’s a legislative battle in Congress or local elections across Vermont. **The truth is we didn’t build this campaign simply to win my race — we built it to deliver real change for those who need it most. That’s why on occasion, we have to ask for a grassroots donation from you and this team.**
[**Would you be willing to pitch in anything you can spare today? We hope to reach our goal with time to spare, and your contribution could make all the difference.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5307?t=3&akid=1227%2E61531%2EZV-Aby)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---

clean_body: We didn't build this campaign simply to win my race — we built it to deliver real change for those who need it most. Happy holidays, friends! Before I go any further, I want to acknowledge that I know you’ve gotten a lot of requests to donate this year. For starters, we just won a 6-year term to the U.S. Senate, and that term hasn’t even begun yet. I know most folks will spend the next few weeks regrouping and recharging for the fight ahead, and I plan to do a little of that as well. But there’s a saying I’m fond of: Stay ready so you don’t have to get ready. These fights over our democracy did not stop once the midterms ended — the next few years in Congress will be one fight after another. And given how the GOP underperformed expectations this year, you can guarantee that they’re eager to turn the tide now that they’ll have a slim majority in the House. I know that the holidays are a time to spend with family, not checking your email. So I’m asking you to make a donation ahead of our end-of-year FEC deadline now so you won’t hear from me much in the days ahead. I believe it’s important to keep the lights on and keep this team together, ready for whatever comes next — whether it’s a legislative battle in Congress or local elections across Vermont. The truth is we didn’t build this campaign simply to win my race — we built it to deliver real change for those who need it most. That’s why on occasion, we have to ask for a grassroots donation from you and this team. If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | Thank you — your support means so much. Have a safe and happy holiday! Peter Welch | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT Welch for Vermont P.O Box 909 Richmond, VT 05477

name: Chrissy
subject: Building a brighter future for PA-06 together
body:
A NOTE FROM CHRISSY

In a year marked by many highlights, one, in particular, stands out – and will for some time: having the opportunity to once again serve our community in Chester and Berks Counties. As I’ve said before, our movement is about building a brighter future that works for each and every one of us in PA-06 and across the country. And while the 2022 elections are over, our efforts to work toward that shared goal are far from finished. In other words, there is work to be done. With that, I’d like to bring you updates on what we’ve accomplished recently.

https://www.chrissyhoulahanforcongress.com

Honored and humbled to serve my community once again
Our community put me in office to uphold our values and serve this purple district, and I remain humbled by that honor. No matter who you supported in this election, I promise to continue to listen and advocate tirelessly for families and businesses in Chester and Berks Counties. With your renewed support and that of an overwhelming majority of our district, I will return to Congress on your behalf and work tirelessly across the aisle to solve the real problems we face, from inflation to attacks on our freedoms and democracy. It’s an honor to serve you.

Love conquers all, celebrating the Respect for Marriage Act
When I decided to run for Congress, my daughter Molly allowed me the opportunity to share her story publicly. From day one, I promised her I’d do something good with that generosity to help the entire LGBTQ community. So I am so happy to say I joined many of my colleagues in passing the Respect for Marriage Act. You can read the full bill here. My daughter Molly, her wife, and all members of the LGBTQ+ community ought to be to love who they love. I am relieved that this bill has passed and look very much forward to President Biden signing it into law this month.

https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/house-bill/8404

Fighting for paid leave for families and businesses
Since coming to Congress, I have made paid family and medical leave a priority. Not just to foster economic growth, but to make it even better – more accessible, equitable, and fair for every family in our country. Given Americans’ broad support for paid family and medical leave, it’s clear we must continue our efforts to enact legislation at the federal level. That's why I created the first-ever bipartisan working group with Rep. Stephanie Bice (R-Okla.) to advance paid leave policies.
Together, we will find solutions to uplift American women, families, and businesses – no matter how big or small.

https://thehill.com/opinion/congress-blog/3771742-regardless-of-party-moms-in-congress-agree-its-time-for-paid-family-leave/

Our 68th town hall
We held our 68th town hall in front of a full crowd in Downingtown a few weeks ago. The safety of our kids is always top of mind, and I'm grateful that our community members gathered to participate in a constructive conversation about the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. I’m incredibly grateful to law enforcement and our educators in particular, who work every day to address serious issues in our schools and communities. It’s clear we must continue our partnerships and collaboration to improve safety in every zip code.

It has been quite a year, and there is more yet to come! As we enter this welcome holiday break, I extend to all of you my very best wishes and gratitude for all you bring to our community here in PA-06 and beyond.

There is work to be done.

– Chrissy

With just two weeks left before the 117th Congress ends, Chrissy is in Washington working to address important pieces of legislation that will help families and businesses in PA-06. On January 3rd, new members will be sworn in and the 118th Congress will convene. Chrissy is committed to delivering for her community. We must be ready to face the challenges ahead. So please, contribute what you can to help us support Chrissy and her momentum going into 2023. Thank you so much for being part of this movement.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/houlahan-digital?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk777-ot-text

--------

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=iQcawLAUEJiKowEBxpAUUYrH%2BGXHGdXnmEo8mf5ogXUDkGpBSMrf29STFwCwcBTluLmlchLyWkJ14%2Ft9xRyz8BwxzU2vMlewTic7OCjTNnuK2UW1TPsZCsxK31utMSTpwAYkyqmwE%2BoN9f0J%2FKE6W%2BpwzQVLtn4qDgJZjF6bXs4hkahEf6Zt2jzgrElb4slF2S1%2FZacNv1XZogyoA1t0S2pb63syFF9b%2BEmtv7g0Ow2kVBdNqXMxccglv2cwpG86uF%2BcEZnNl7gTYJjArXWluhsrQGJmeMxwxLruOd2gawzvkMrRIq2T2eUQwrrOlPwNw0OmEmpgZoq8Cq69X5XRAnsxAFvazARQYWwoXbA3aMbil7wmozAthyv2ZrW0oBQyI1W2qlk7AcyQbAd7qrbR2whUG5E%2BAE09U0GrgE0GEPwP6rN0DgkUI8TEXAVxDHOO

Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force.

name: Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise
subject: I can’t close the survey without your response!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Friend,
My team combed through the early responses to my Majority Leader Survey and informed me your response is still missing.
We only asked a handful of our top Patriots to reply and need **100% participation** in order to fully represent our movement.
I'd hate to close the survey without hearing from you, so I'm giving you one final chance to submit your honest feedback. [**Can you submit your response to my Majority Leader Survey before 11:59 PM?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmjaeh5hb74itvsrie5eacfsuom65ptsgsk7r668_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmaob1cph2bs)
I look forward to hearing from you, Friend.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Forwarded Message Below:_
**OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM MAJORITY LEADER-ELECT STEVE SCALISE**
---
Hey Friend,
I just released my FIRST-EVER [**Majority Leader Survey**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfon5rur78pcu2ckot89omf8mamgtpeh694bai1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmaob1cph2bs) and I want YOU to be in the first round of Patriots to submit their response.
[**My survey only takes a few minutes to complete, but I need your response by 11:59 PM tonight!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z84tfo3k2c2kbjm72u6cc4dans74jfs750m58100_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmaob1cph2bs) Consider this your opportunity to be open and honest with Congressional leaders.
******[SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ugdj3beahvb5482r0jooo9hl5iderag67huo5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cljmaob1cph2bs)**
It's critical I get your response before then because I'm meeting with top Republican leaders before our legislative deadline. Without your feedback, I'll be powerless to change our agenda in Washington.
I look forward to reading your response.
Thank you,
Steve Scalise

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Whoa: Turnout in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12192022 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12192022]
Team,
Now that last month’s race was certified, we’re seeing some final data on turnout in MI-07 and wanted to share.
First is a reminder of Elissa’s win margin (the biggest yet!) thanks to this graphic shared on Twitter, courtesy of the New York Times:
[https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/oNDY9lETZLrPL2y_FqN31g5-RR2WG7A-OAhQFjNGuOQg9mS-fEMRlbFn7gWE9hUHam9jhrEebCEg6iunoIVTbqq2P3UsepvR3haw6nrSa4eVR0xWPtNogxxk5veT1vdM9aXFRMjA4s_wHHIBensWpuzrvleI0zIPXjEUgK9o8wmyEUdmySC2VQON6dvaxQ]
That data also highlights the strong turnout in Michigan. In fact, our state set a new record with about 4.5 million Michiganders voting , which Secretary Benson confirmed is the state's highest turnout ever in a midterm.
That high turnout was because both parties and Independents came out, which was likely driven in part by Prop 3 on the ballot.
Here’s some additional data we love: According to one of our favorite Michigan political accounts, MI-07 ranked among the top five congressional districts with the highest turnout in the country! And five of Michigan’s districts ranked among the country’s top 10:
[https://lh4.googleusercontent.com/bBwdDtUhn1hl5cSilXUWqouL_Df-buUngZGbw41NG2FIITJs3qawVgIeUSulu3T2_nKnzBm-epFZZ7UwkyJLCbxmf_N03gFH5oMDM19a0cS7OeOO8F2BdZfXXqItD4tPjvjl8cOJhu8JTTHNTHjVni-LiKInItR0Sf81uuJncE-R3GfkMCACmY2f3kqztQ]
It’s clear Michiganders were motivated to make their voices heard last month.
Michigan made us proud. Your support continues to make us proud. We’re ending 2022 feeling blessed and thankful!
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12192022]
Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she is running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

name: Greg Landsman
subject: My top priorities in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Everyone deserves a seat at the table.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56192809/384224187/-1334107482?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTIyMmUxOS04ZTgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qH_QQblD-AttKzc7OJgd0qKYYWRm-YLNn4nQAwVocSA=)

I’m ready to represent Ohio’s 1st district come January 3rd — because Southwest Ohio deserves leadership it can count on. My top priorities:

**When I’m in Congress, I will continue to reject every cent of corporate PAC money** — because I’m not beholden to special interests, I’m beholden to you.

**I’m committed to working across the aisle at every opportunity.** It’s about time our working families had a representative that fights _for_ them, and _with_ them every day.

**And, I’m embarking on a 100-day tour across OH-01.** It’s important to hear all voices — _whether they agree with us or not_ — and listen to what they want out of their representation. Everyone deserves a seat at the table.

[**_We’re already hitting the ground running, friend, and I’m honored to have you on our team. clean_body: Everyone deserves a seat at the table. | = I’m ready to represent Ohio’s 1st district come January 3rd — because Southwest Ohio deserves leadership it can count on. My top priorities: When I’m in Congress, I will continue to reject every cent of corporate PAC money — because I’m not beholden to special interests, I’m beholden to you. I’m committed to working across the aisle at every opportunity. It’s about time our working families had a representative that fights for them, and with them every day. And, I’m embarking on a 100-day tour across OH-01. It’s important to hear all voices — whether they agree with us or not — and listen to what they want out of their representation. Everyone deserves a seat at the table. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = With gratitude, Greg Landsman Congressman-Elect, OH-01 | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema’s abortion stance is endangering women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Kyrsten Sinema says she cares about abortion rights— but has actively blocked Democrats’ ability to restore the rights that the Supreme Court took away. With the present abortion bans in place, women in dozens of Republican-led states are unable to find the medical care they need — and doctors are unable to do their jobs without fear of legal retribution. This week in Idaho, for example, a woman who is in the process of miscarrying has taken to social media to document herself getting sicker and sicker - because doctors won’t perform the abortion she needs. This is the hell that Kyrsten Sinema helped create when she decided upholding the filibuster was more important than codifying Roe v. Wade. [**This is why we’re working to replace her in 2024–to make sure her first term is also her last. Chip in now so we can start off strong >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcq1xMvk0rI0jyNXSf0wDxclyCeYU1ww6jUcCkzbEH_J8OhMCrG7ajqwxRLBFfMV_QLLFny55g26f7oUnP0_Ff4KV-97gIkbVhTqPkV-za0tx2omAbUClHXsz7xAJUZzWIrgOdKn6cjdtA-XSMJbujGBCshdLJH4SZgr447MA1LwNhlkxsCQs3rhrIuDxGuq9ofvrp5U0Qu17cKmVK9R42lUDLg9Yv3f-LFHS8En5Qpbj0fk3Vsc3fU7taVXt_BtVpAefE-h5hBH3PNTCVRu8ANfbytcXfROUlpBNIwM9tqjW_XoNepMd1qofwRmeU5NAowShDsIbRip7n44LZY2dctQ/3s5/GHS59c4JQhiunXOKzsFHTQ/h0/dXtesG6w3Bi03kMeUFKNfDeWWkSAl1wbhOFHyOIwm-A) [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fc5ZFZO4MJ7ghDwVDR2t2nsbldNlRDSDlyEdOCAtW5ouiMw_mvksPipLYeUaJTAmJshU75SeObGZveRqyTp-6xo2LoQElca3yGA6lr37umBrd3pG8528l-vlmdTtQg-WLqIX4pI4SwBMIhlduAyLVP_X_VNS5wmNmGaoqQ1VWyfUA_-fFfn_MQSjo7F-igXDR9tqN8YZU-mqYo7922_0TVCqB11nkMkSHVzox9mHz7W4uDUcFD6DnjZX_RuB2o_wbUz57UVA4xd6a3yMjSHpUvbYx_IsNal5A7TvyKr9lCb68LSfAX2CkiJJZbk9RbMzhwZaZozHvshC9YwEQmfR5ctg/3s5/GHS59c4JQhiunXOKzsFHTQ/h1/8n_VtGlykTiqwnmqb4an10mfExbhnK261AA4Wm2nf5U) Sinema’s first priority should be protecting our fundamental rights – but instead, she cares way more about making headlines and her relationships with Wall Street. name: Lucas Baumgartner
subject: How I destroyed vaccine mandates at my college
body:
Do you want to know how?
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUEFOwzAQfI1za-RsErs95ABUIKjEAYEEJ8uxN63BjlPXaQmvxy2BA5K1sme8szuDTcF4UdcrvuKZbiSTHerMNEABCgBaLOmqpjnlasmhqmqsq4pWmlQUnTQ2l8VJhuC9y5V32a7RZVfxlgEtu3LJZAuM1Si7VFvZKuwy2-xiHA6kvCJwm84B1Rgwlz1qH88iCZukNS2GOKW7d13UpLwdoxMOtRkdKdeX2QTYGTz4MShMYK-skG6wpptmSqWnNNs-kT9uFklZaN_LaHwv_BCNM18oZgtC-aPR4mhU9GESbfAfGOQWxW8Yv7K-j9jHn5GL19fP95fVMztuEi16a9K263_gzujkeE2n5f1na5-y0OjhZKw1B8ZTlNtLlOcA5_0bwq8JwKUN4JIV7N9OLozvbnO3gIe3xZ49uvpMwk2qcRrw7-csks8pAeHrb9xynQI)

Hello Friend,

I DESTROYED the vaccine mandate at my school, the Colorado School of Mines.

Do you want to know how?

I began attending the Colorado School of Mines at the onset of the COVID-19 lockdowns. At the time, there was a mask mandate, a vaccine mandate, and ongoing quarantines within the university.

I knew I had to get involved.

I learned about Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) while listening to the Tom Woods Show. They are the nation's largest, most active, and most effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American politics.

I found hope in their legislative success -- especially at a time when the government seemed unstoppable.

So I contacted YAL to begin a chapter on my campus.

I worked with other students who joined my club along with regional and national staff to STOP the mask mandates. And we WON!

[_**Because of supporters like you, YAL is able to mobilize countless activists and reclaim American liberty on college campuses. You can help YAL safeguard our liberty by sending your urgent gift today >>>**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkM1OAyEUhZ-G2XUClJ_OYhZqo1GjiW6MbggDty0Kw0gZ6_j00jq6MCEEzoFz7_2gJUISzhvZyMq2WugN2Mq1FFNKKMVkhRuOayzNSlLGOHDGMLOIYQja-VqTg04pxlCbGKpdi5uGCZCiIXbJGkI60NxwAoYzKVZEVL7d5Tzs0fIM0cuy9mDGBLXuwcZ8DCnapL3rIOWpnGPYZIuWl2MOKoB1Y0DL9ak2ouIo7uOYDBSxN17pMHi3mWbLlKt2276YP9MsSrKysdfZxV7FIbvgvkDNIygTP5xVH87kmCbVpfgGSW9B_cL4jY19hj7_lFywfHf-cPX00h2KrXrvSrfrf-LO2TLxGk-r68_OP1aptcPBee_2QhaU2xPKI8C5_xbJc0Tp6RulJ1b0_fkQ0vgabq8W9OZ58S7uAz-a9KLseRrg7-UcUs-UKJLrb-BBm50)

After we repealed the mask mandate, we doubled our efforts to repeal the vaccine mandate.

It took almost three months of hard work from the chapter members, but we gathered hundreds of petition signatures and forced them to listen to our demands.

**Two weeks later, the vaccine mandate was lifted, creating more choice and freedom for thousands of students!**

While I had a victory on my campus, that's only one of the thousands in America.

[_**Friend, can you help support the next campus fight with a gift of $10, $35, or $50 today? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUEFPwyAY_TX0tobSUtpDD2rVqIkx3nYiFL5ubFAqo27118u2zoMJIfAevO-9B01WsozSmtUsUY0oRQ8q0Q3BhGSE4KzCNcUpZrJipCgo0KLAhUIFBiu0SUV2FN47Z1PpbLJtWNXRPO9x1mNa4x6YyGVVq45WHQbWVYlptiGMB5TfIfIU1wHk5CEVAygXziIRm4XRHfgwx7OzfVAof5qC5RaUnizK28tsRMozeHCTlxDBQRou7Gh0Py-UjFehN0Mkr2lWUZkrN4ig3cDdGLTVP8CXCFy6b634t5bB-Zl33u3Biw3wWxk3WTcEGMJ15Or5uK9Pj7uPOTov-WB0dNv-A7daxcQtnquXU2c-E9-o8aiN0YeSxSo3lyrPBS7-G8TuESGXb4RcuiJf66P1086-Pa_I63r1Vb5beibJQ9zDPMLfy0UkXVoiiLW_c2ydJA)

Unfortunately, the fight isn't over yet, Friend.

With the end of the COVID-19 tyranny, we are back to where we were three years ago.

If we accept our wins and sit still, _we will continue to lose our liberties_.

That's why we must keep building momentum and continue the fight for freedom.

My journey through the liberty movement gave me a stark realization: **the jewel of American liberty is in constant jeopardy, and we must defend it with jealous attention. **

Friend, I am asking for your support, so YAL can continue to reclaim our stolen American liberty. Click below to send your gift today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUE1TwyAU_DXk1gx5-SA95KB26mhnPHjriSHw2qJ8pJRY46-XxujBGYaBXdi3u9gVDSvqes3WLFOdaMQBVaY7oAAFAC1auq5pTplsGVRVjXVV0UqRiqIV2uSiuIoQvLe59DY7dUpULUrBGCuxxEMPbaWwLwvVrCVS1WSmO8U4XEh5R2Cb1gXlGDAXDpWPN5GETcLoHkOc0tnbQ1Sk3ArrRxdJuSkogWaMlltUerQJmZ0s4MWPQWICnTRc2MHow7RQMl2FPrpE_mRbpTlceSei9o77IWqrv5Avgbj0H1rxDy2jDxPvg3_HII7If6v5lfUu4uwsjVxN6rPfid65faK5Mzp53_wDT1ql_Bs6tU-fvXnNQqeGqzZGXxqWij3Oxd7qXPx3hN0TgPkbwNwcnPdXG8Y3u3tcwfN-dW5ebH0j4SHtcRrw7-Uiki8tAWGbb-hWonU)

clean_body: Do you want to know how? Hello Friend, I DESTROYED the vaccine mandate at my school, the Colorado School of Mines. Do you want to know how? I began attending the Colorado School of Mines at the onset of the COVID-19 lockdowns. At the time, there was a mask mandate, a vaccine mandate, and ongoing quarantines within the university. I knew I had to get involved. I learned about Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) while listening to the Tom Woods Show. They are the nation's largest, most active, and most effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American politics. I found hope in their legislative success -- especially at a time when the government seemed unstoppable. So I contacted YAL to begin a chapter on my campus. I worked with other students who joined my club along with regional and national staff to STOP the mask mandates. And we WON! After we repealed the mask mandate, we doubled our efforts to repeal the vaccine mandate. It took almost three months of hard work from the chapter members, but we gathered hundreds of petition signatures and forced them to listen to our demands. Two weeks later, the vaccine mandate was lifted, creating more choice and freedom for thousands of students! While I had a victory on my campus, that's only one of the thousands in America. Unfortunately, the fight isn't over yet, Friend. With the end of the COVID-19 tyranny, we are back to where we were three years ago. If we accept our wins and sit still, we will continue to lose our liberties. That's why we must keep building momentum and continue the fight for freedom. My journey through the liberty movement gave me a stark realization: the jewel of American liberty is in constant jeopardy, and we must defend it with jealous attention. Friend, I am asking for your support, so YAL can continue to reclaim our stolen American liberty. Click below to send your gift today. Thank you, Lucas Baumgartner Young Americans for Liberty Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Young Americans for Liberty Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions to the extent permitted by law. No goods or services were given in exchange for this contribution.

| #### [ BREAKING: Major Decision Made On Kari Lake's Election Lawsuit Maricopa County Superior Judge Peter Thompson ruled that two of Kari Lake’s 10 different claims can go to trial. The claims allowed by Judge Thompson involve the breakdowns/malfunctioning of printers, along with Election Day and ballot chain of custody issues. Lake’s lawsuit alleged that between 15,603 and 29,257 Republicans were disenfranchised who would have likely voted for Lake. subject: We must be prepared for the next pandemic

body:
Tell the Senate: Pass the PREVENT Pandemics Act
#
Peter,
There is no question that all of our lives were upended by the COVID-19 pandemic. In the other Washington, one of my top priorities is ensuring we’re prepared for the next public health crisis.
I’ve been working tooth and nail on legislation that would help make sure we’re never in that situation again. This legislation would make sure people, families, businesses, and public health officials have and can get the information they need to stay safe and informed. We have to learn from COVID-19 and do better next time. And that’s what I’ve been working to do.
My PREVENT Pandemics Act is a bipartisan bill that makes sure we get a better handle on public health crises in the future–and I am working hard to get it passed as part of the Senate’s end-of-year legislation.
**[We must be prepared for the next pandemic. Will you join me in calling on the Senate to get this important public health legislation over the finish line in the coming days?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56203188/384258769/-201188838?refcode=pm_em_221220_1&ms=pm_em_221220_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTY2ZWYyNS1iYjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-c4G9vxbLgiUjWrupIgmE5Qe2OohGyA8rRtsCmMdX4=&emci=680754b7-a280-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=5166ef25-bb80-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=13116610)**

Hi friends, As we prepare to spend the holiday season with our loved ones and look ahead to the new year, I wanted to check in one last time before 2022 ends to ask what’s on your mind. Aruna and I are hard at work getting ready to serve you in Annapolis as your next Governor and Lieutenant Governor this January, and we have a big to-do list: create more opportunities for work, wages, and wealth, give every child in Maryland a world-class public education, achieve a 21st century public transit system, make our communities safer, and so much more. Elevate,
Wes

Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Battles ahead for labor, climate, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: 2022 Recap | Battles Ahead: Climate, M4A, Worker Power & More |
Dirty Deal Dies Again | Fund the NLRB! | Defending Democracy | Party Power
| & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1011&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

A SPECIAL NOTE TO OUR REVOLUTION SUPPORTERS
Thank you. If you donated, volunteered, joined a rally, or took action in
2022, you helped make it a year of advancement for the progressive
movement.

Despite painful blows from corporate Dems and Republicans, we’ve made
policy gains we can build on in the year to come — on climate, drug
pricing, and more.

And, together, we overcame right wing and big money interests to flip a
Senate seat in PA, win the Georgia Runoff, and elect 9 new House
progressives.

READ OUR 2022 RECAP BELOW

We’re fighting to the end in 2022 to Fund the NLRB and Stop Manchin’s
Dirty Deal, but many important battles lie ahead.

Our Revolution has an exciting year planned in 2023 — from building local
power and labor power to the fights for wages, housing, Medicare for All,
and more.

Stay tuned for the return of the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8166?t=1012&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Revolution Report on January 7th,
2023! And kick off the New Year with us on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]National Organizing Call
on January 9th!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1014&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]We truly appreciate your support of Our Revolution and hope you’ll
consider becoming a member. Recurring monthly donations provide the stable
resources we need to invest for 2023.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1015&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

CHANGE CAN’T WAIT

Members of Our Revolution are making change happen. Against intense
corporate opposition, our inside-outside strategy is moving the ball
forward, but the clock is ticking.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1016&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

In 2022, we put our demands on the table and got Congress to take steps to
tax corporations, let Medicare negotiate drug prices with Big Pharma, and
invest in renewable energy.

We also saw a right wing Supreme Court overturn Roe v. Wade and we saw
Democratic leadership cave to corporations to force a contract on rail
workers and water down the legislation we did get.

People and the planet can’t wait. We’re forging the strongest, most
effective movement we can to make our government empower workers, expand
democracy, deliver on healthcare, and save the planet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1017&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]We must organize to win, and that requires people-power. Join as an
active member of Our Revolution to help us scale up for the tough fights
in 2023.

★ ★ ★

2023 EXECUTIVE ACTIONS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1018&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

In 2022, President Biden used executive action to expunge federal
marijuana convictions, enact gun safety measures, and try to pass student
debt relief.

With a Republican House in 2023, he needs to do much more, starting with
paid sick days for rail workers. Biden can hold corporations accountable
for price gouging, wage theft, workplace safety and retaliation — and
ensure union rights for federal contractors.

He can also ban drilling on federal lands, stop fossil fuel exports,
reduce healthcare/drug costs, close the carried interest loophole, and
reverse Trump-era offshore tax loopholes.

“If you think you’re going to rest on what you achieved so far, which is a
step forward but not enough by any stretch, then we’ll have a serious
problem in 2024,” Our Revolution comms and campaigns director Paco Fabian
told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8167?t=1019&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]The Hill.

★ ★ ★

CLIMATE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1020&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Our Revolution remains at the forefront of the climate fight,
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7611?t=1021&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]partnering with Greenpeace and a coalition of 754 groups to defeat
Manchin’s Dirty Deal three times.

The renewable energy investments we got in the IRA are just a start. And,
we’re ramping up our work to end fossil field subsidies — especially as
they gouge us at the pump and rake in record profits!

This year, President Biden enacted the Defense Production Act to spur
domestic clean energy production, but that same day rewarded fossil fuel
companies with a $10B tax break by suspending the gas tax.

★ ★ ★

DIRTY DEAL GOES DOWN!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1022&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Because we can rely on the recurring donations from our grassroots
supporters, Our Revolution activists were able to jump into rapid response
to stop Manchin’s Dirty Deal THREE TIMES this year.

Every time this zombie bill reared its ugly head, we mobilized our
networks to mount a pressure campaign and demonstrate citizen opposition.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1023&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Thank you to all who rallied with us on Capitol Hill and mobilized
thousands of calls to Congress to stop this toxic deal to fast-track
fossil fuel projects and gut protections for frontline communities.

We joined our outside organizing work with support from elected leaders
like US Reps. Rashida Tlaib and Ro Khanna in this fight, showing how our
inside-outside strategy can win.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1024&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Recurring donations give us the stable resources we can count on to
jump into rapid response as policy fights and opportunities arise.

★ ★ ★

WORKER POWER

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1025&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

2022 was a big year for Labor — in spite of blows from corporate
politicians blocking the PRO Act and siding with the bosses against rail
workers.

Our Revolution activists proudly joined Amazon, Starbucks, and other
workers at protests and on picket lines, but we’ve also been organizing to
win policies that [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/6041?t=1026&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]build worker power.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1027&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Last summer, Our Revolution mobilized calls to flip CA State Senate votes,
pressured Gov. Gavin Newsom, and joined with half a million fast food
workers to win AB 257.

This is a BIG deal! An industry-wide workers’ council is a step toward
sectoral bargaining, and we can use this as a template for other states
around the country.

Our work with striking Maximus call center workers — seeking better pay
and wages — will continue in 2023 as we won’t let Biden forget the need to
help federal contractors unionize.

★ ★ ★

MAKE AMAZON PAY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1028&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

On Black Friday, Our Revolution [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8078?t=1029&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]led actions in cities across America
as part of a global effort to Make Amazon Pay — pay their workers, their
taxes, and for their climate damage.

In NYC, we protested outside of Jeff Bezos’ penthouse; and in Washington
DC, we rallied at Amazon Fresh. We stood in solidarity with 80 unions and
groups striking and rallying in 32 countries — from Bangladesh to Germany
to Colombia.

★ ★ ★

FUND THE NLRB!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1030&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Last week, Our Revolution activists [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8168?t=1031&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]rallied at the Capitol with labor
leaders and the Worker Power Coalition, demanding $368B to fund the
National Labor Relations Board.

We were joined by House progressives Andy Levin, AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan
Omar, and Ro Khanna, who spoke on the need to give workers a fighting
chance in 2023.

“The fact we have to draw attention to this issue shows what’s
fundamentally wrong,” Our Revolution Exec Director Joseph Geevarghese told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8169?t=1032&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]TIME at the Capitol. “The Democratic Party is not in touch with its
working class roots.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1033&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Our movement worked hard in 2022 to expand Medicare because ultimately
this country must have a single-payer Medicare for All system.

We got first steps for Medicare to negotiate drug prices in the IRA, but
corporate Dems blocked dental, hearing and vision expansion. Giving up is
not an option.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1034&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Our Revolution organizers are growing federal support by flipping Reps
like Donald Norcross (NJ-1) to join the 120 cosponsors of Medicare for All
in the U.S. House — the most ever!

We look forward to Medicare for All being reintroduced in Congress this
spring, and we’re supporting statewide M4A programs in NY, WA, and CA.

Other fights this year included backing Bernie’s push for expanding social
security, a windfall profits tax, busting big tech with antitrust bills,
saving the postal service, and ending U.S. support for the Saudi-led war
in Yemen.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1035&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Sign-up as a member for as little as $5 a month, and help us continue
the fight for climate, labor, Medicare for All, and more in the year to
come.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1036&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1037&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Thanks to our grassroots funders and volunteers, Our Revolution maximized
the 2022 midterms to alter the political terrain on which we fight for
issues.

Without our movement going to the polls, Democrats would not have fended
off a red wave or held the Senate.

We helped Senator Warnock win the Georgia Runoff and flipped a Senate seat
with John Fetterman running as a progressive populist in Pennsylvania.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1038&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

We proved in the 2022 elections that progressive policy and organizing are
a roadmap for victory.

Making nearly 5 million direct voter contacts, Our Revolution mobilized
progressive, working class, and young voters who were the margin of
victory in key races.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1039&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Nine new Our Revolution-backed progressives are heading to the US House! —
Summer Lee, Greg Casar, Delia Ramirez, Maxwell Frost, Becca Balint, Andrea
Salinas, Jasmine Crockett, Jonathan Jackson, and Val Hoyle.

“We will have a historic number of progressives in Congress,” said US
Rep-elect Our Revolution member Greg Casar (TX-35).

While many candidates were the targets of billionaires and SuperPACs,
progressives continue to adapt and improve our strategy with every
election cycle.

“Despite major efforts by outside spending groups to move the Party to the
right, the leftward push continues,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8013?t=1040&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Slate wrote.

★ ★ ★

BUILDING DOWN BALLOT POWER

At Our Revolution, we know the critical importance of state and local
power to our lives and the success of our larger movement.

In 2022, our supporters elected mayors, city counselors and county
commissioners from coast to coast — and in 2023, we’ll be organizing our
progressive blocs into action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1041&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

In one of the most-watched state races of 2022, Minnesota AG Keith Ellison
proved you can take on corporate criminals, prosecute the police officer
who murdered George Floyd, and win re-election!

Keith was a main target of the far right on criminal justice — and
standing up to corporate power has earned him powerful enemies — but our
volunteers made 100,000+ calls to MN voters and Keith held his seat by
20,000 votes!

“Thanks to Our Revolution, we’re going to continue our work to make sure
folks can afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect —
every day,” Keith said.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1042&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

In St. Louis, Missouri, Our Revolution has spent multiple election cycles
growing a progressive majority that now controls the mayor’s office and
city board — and it’s in Cori Bush’s district (MO-1)!

This year, we helped power the grassroots campaign of former Bernie
delegate Megan Green to become President of the St. Louis Board of
Aldermen against a wave of big developer cash.

With a bloc of progressives now at the helm in St. Louis, we’re positioned
to operate a progressive city in 2023.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1043&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]To make change, we need more power — on the inside and outside. Become
a member of Our Revolution to fund critical election work in 2023.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1044&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1045&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Our Revolution led efforts to defend democracy in 2022 — from our work on
voting rights to our legal challenges against rightwing extremists like
Lauren Boebert, Jim Jordan and others.

We mobilized rallies and public calls to secretaries of state to uphold
the Constitution and bar insurrectionists from the ballot.

As a result, Marjorie Taylor-Greene was grilled under oath in a Georgia
court. And, of course, Donald Trump has also disqualified himself from
serving in government.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1046&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1047&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Our Revolution leaders continue to deepen our work within the Democratic
Party, where we‘ve created the largest progressive bloc ever. This is
about building institutional power, and we’re remaking politics from the
inside out.

This year, OR board members Larry Cohen and Jane Kleeb led a push to get
dark money out of the DNC and modernize the Party to be more democratic
and transparent.

Since 2016, we’ve eliminated superdelegates on the first ballot, created
the first-ever DNC Climate Council, and grown progressive leadership in
state and local parties.

“People think of the DNC as something party elites and consultants do,”
Jane said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5014?t=1048&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]National Organizing Call in March, “but it is and
should be made up of people who get elected up from the grassroots.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1049&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1050&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for just $5/mo. and get your
official membership card. For $10, get our collectible sticker 6-pack —
$15, get the stickers + a poster — $27, get both + a tote bag — $50, get
it ALL + a T-shirt!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1051&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8170?t=1052&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1053&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20221220_1_1.neg-J1&t=1007&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20221220_1_1.YVNeXD&t=1008&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20221220_1_1.qKNUXD&t=1009&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_DONOR_20221220_1_1.BKdK6P&t=1010&akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3838%2E5885482%2ExAVYkj

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

We helped Senator Warnock win the Georgia Runoff and flipped a Senate seat with John Fetterman running as a progressive populist in Pennsylvania. [ ][IMG] We proved in the 2022 elections that progressive policy and organizing are a roadmap for victory. Making nearly 5 million direct voter contacts, Our Revolution mobilized progressive, working class, and young voters who were the margin of victory in key races. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Nine new Our Revolution-backed progressives are heading to the US House! — Summer Lee, Greg Casar, Delia Ramirez, Maxwell Frost, Becca Balint, Andrea Salinas, Jasmine Crockett, Jonathan Jackson, and Val Hoyle. “We will have a historic number of progressives in Congress,” said US Rep-elect Our Revolution member Greg Casar (TX-35). While many candidates were the targets of billionaires and SuperPACs, progressives continue to adapt and improve our strategy with every election cycle. “Despite major efforts by outside spending groups to move the Party to the right, the leftward push continues,” [ ]Slate wrote. ★ ★ ★ BUILDING DOWN BALLOT POWER At Our Revolution, we know the critical importance of state and local power to our lives and the success of our larger movement. In 2022, our supporters elected mayors, city counselors and county commissioners from coast to coast — and in 2023, we’ll be organizing our progressive blocs into action. [ ][IMG] In one of the most-watched state races of 2022, Minnesota AG Keith Ellison proved you can take on corporate criminals, prosecute the police officer who murdered George Floyd, and win re-election! Keith was a main target of the far right on criminal justice — and standing up to corporate power has earned him powerful enemies — but our volunteers made 100,000+ calls to MN voters and Keith held his seat by 20,000 votes! “Thanks to Our Revolution, we’re going to continue our work to make sure folks can afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect — every day,” Keith said. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] In St. Louis, Missouri, Our Revolution has spent multiple election cycles growing a progressive majority that now controls the mayor’s office and city board — and it’s in Cori Bush’s district (MO-1)! This year, we helped power the grassroots campaign of former Bernie delegate Megan Green to become President of the St. Louis Board of Aldermen against a wave of big developer cash. With a bloc of progressives now at the helm in St. Louis, we’re positioned to operate a progressive city in 2023. [ ]To make change, we need more power — on the inside and outside. Become a member of Our Revolution to fund critical election work in 2023. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution led efforts to defend democracy in 2022 — from our work on voting rights to our legal challenges against rightwing extremists like Lauren Boebert, Jim Jordan and others. We mobilized rallies and public calls to secretaries of state to uphold the Constitution and bar insurrectionists from the ballot. As a result, Marjorie Taylor-Greene was grilled under oath in a Georgia court. And, of course, Donald Trump has also disqualified himself from serving in government. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution leaders continue to deepen our work within the Democratic Party, where we‘ve created the largest progressive bloc ever. This is about building institutional power, and we’re remaking politics from the inside out. This year, OR board members Larry Cohen and Jane Kleeb led a push to get dark money out of the DNC and modernize the Party to be more democratic and transparent. Since 2016, we’ve eliminated superdelegates on the first ballot, created the first-ever DNC Climate Council, and grown progressive leadership in state and local parties. “People think of the DNC as something party elites and consultants do,” Jane said on our [ ]National Organizing Call in March, “but it is and should be made up of people who get elected up from the grassroots.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for just $5/mo. and get your official membership card. For $10, get our collectible sticker 6-pack — $15, get the stickers + a poster — $27, get both + a tote bag — $50, get it ALL + a T-shirt! [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad622b5910b74439bb00ac180f1a3e18&_e=t65_MuPHgj3UE0knOQUM2u5-L_d1aiI08b1S5GfKl-yEmo1QhzldDMtxdTSILlimqMAOrVWhzcLiFagBZHrr1zsnU0S6g69eUtQYpqq4B0goXy1pLPBmXjdfyEUXJXTkuI1UnvwY3PSmU3CS7jt8IHsuZocd-fLBZOjNHR1k8homD8cpP6Sqb7Q9FODev9RmzFC8VXG0gnn0TJ3grINU3PvQahdokX4XmX0lyGSgyWPcV01H7T-LLYjfjGXZWGfC9UYJDkk4tnlPhaLfhi4Upgq8Y58XQd1Fcnt2HcbqtfGvWIxYExN1xsg7nvVn6zgeLKPaRejSwFBNaqLcWRNXI04QufzBpVJdEZnNiUP1wxUuzL1fXdc-JPSf_qqyg6ZX)
---
| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David's momentous story provides profound insights into many of life's most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **" The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King"** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David's character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we 've produced our online course, "The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King," which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad622b5910b74439bb00ac180f1a3e18&_e=t65_MuPHgj3UE0knOQUM2u5-L_d1aiI08b1S5GfKl-yEmo1QhzldDMtxdTSILlimqMAOrVWhzcLiFagBZHrr1zsnU0S6g69eUtQYpqq4B0goXy1pLPBmXjdfyEUXJXTkuI1UnvwY3PSmU3CS7jt8IHsuZocd-fLBZOjNHR1k8homD8cpP6Sqb7Q9FODev9RmzFC8VXG0gnn0TJ3grINU3PvQahdokX4XmX0lyGSgyWPTIIINUrx4goWwKk9Au2XyoCzNqL5NPHNwDQ7x9UADuQeAuAEWhTldMIe_D9UXW_N8fCgTsOb3KcdoXnt5nKsz9GTODahofsJnxHOJU6W_ESN7_q6vSdqqhbjk27aFBKQyAPc6Qu8jLLhdcy4oOdpu)** By viewing the course, you'll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you'll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you 'll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ad622b5910b74439bb00ac180f1a3e18&_e=t65_MuPHgj3UE0knOQUM2u5-L_d1aiI08b1S5GfKl-yEmo1QhzldDMtxdTSILlimqMAOrVWhzcLiFagBZHrr1zsnU0S6g69eUtQYpqq4B0goXy1pLPBmXjdfyEUXJXTkuI1UnvwY3PSmU3CS7jt8IHsuZocd-fLBZOjNHR1k8homD8cpP6Sqb7Q9FODev9RmzFC8VXG0gnn0TJ3grINU3PvQahdokX4XmX0lyGSgyWOd2QALCms75fYKz_m9lTOhUo6wMkPM9XEi16806jUa29Qfubb6TWqXYIHfNuobmCrCUit_93Zf9OR8hVoKQx-0mG08bM8gwPiZkFuVGVL_o-OyNoUWi3YAvJpmrxPnukhRVjJJyUNUwMhk55pqSrqN)
---
| | Let's learn what truly matters in life by studying **" The David Story."**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you'd like to secure a DVD box set of **" The David Story"** while they're available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Hi Peter, it’s Greg Casar here, Congressman-elect for TX-35.
Justice Democrats helped me win my race and did the same for many other progressives who were elected across the country, from Pennsylvania to Missouri to down here in Texas.
We know that to transform the status quo, we need bold progressives who will deliver for working families in Washington. That’s what Justice Democrats does — recruit and endorse local leaders to fight for our communities.
Just like my campaign, JD relies on grassroots contributions, not big, corporate PACs to get their work done. Justice Democrats just launched their 2024 Candidate Recruitment efforts and so I have a favor to ask of you:
[**Will you consider splitting a $12**** contribution today to support JD’s 2024 candidate recruitment? It will make a really big difference as we fight to pass the transformative policies that our people need and deserve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56203652/384259944/-803557127?refcode=em-20221220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWNhN2Q1YS1iZTgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKWAyMIdDlLZjKlJRnOnwfkHoEcahK1VAqXi5IkgYe4=)

I am so proud to be a Justice Democrat. After constant attacks from the likes of extreme Republicans like Greg Abbott, working Texans need a progressive fighter who can deliver on Medicare for All, good jobs, and reproductive rights. Lives depend on it.
I am ready to be that fighter in Congress starting on Jan. 3rd. By supporting JD today, together we can elect even more progressives to Congress who will fight together for bold solutions to the issues we face.
[**Please support Justice Democrats today by splitting a contribution with us today to help them reach their $120,000 2024 Candidate Recruitment fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56203654/384259946/-2010228105?refcode=em-20221220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWNhN2Q1YS1iZTgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKWAyMIdDlLZjKlJRnOnwfkHoEcahK1VAqXi5IkgYe4=)
Thank you for your time and support,
Greg

subject: BREAKING: conservative news update you can't miss
body:
New revelations show that just months before his election as chairman of the Republican Party of Illinois, Don Tracy made a personal donation to...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/78c6adac9e34/breaking-conservative-news-update-you-cant-miss?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Don Tracy Donates to Democrat Endorsed by Sen. Dick Durbin Just Months Before His IL GOP Chair Election (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-donates-to-democrat-endorsed-by-sen-durbin-just-months-before-his-il-gop-chair-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In 2002, Don Tracy ran in the Illinois primary for the 50th State Senate District as a Democrat (https://www.elections.il.gov/ElectionOperations/CandidateDetailEO.aspx?CandidateID=R%2fbzwrvri7J3D7vdz10qXA%3d%3d&ElectionID=pq0YmF3ui0Y%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

In 2020, during the height of the pandemic, Tracy’s family-owned business, Dot Foods – where he is an owner, donated to Democratic presidential candidate
Joe Biden (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/dot-foods/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000044109&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

And new revelations uncovered by Illinois Review show that on September 4, 2020 – just months before his election as chairman of the Republican Party of Illinois, Tracy made a personal donation to
Citizens for Judge Emily Sutton (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ItemizedContributions.aspx?FiledDocID=beZieuE5oP9U1t5MHGqAVw%3d%3d&ContributionType=zE4UTaWYkl1RdymXPLZxQwzsAP9P4ghkZA2i6IaESd1kUdPzCJLwaPqANp%2f5Rc0Imd73yqYn8DQ%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – a Democrat (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/CandidateDetailCD.aspx?ID=V9h2FiNb%2fbRJysvQMLJ24Q%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) running for Circuit Court Judge in the 9th Judicial Circuit.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-donates-to-democrat-endorsed-by-sen-durbin-just-months-before-his-il-gop-chair-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Just prior to Tracy’s donation, Sutton received a boost from ** two influential Illinois Democrats (https://www.wgil.com/2020/10/07/judge-emily-sutton-gains-bustos-and-durbin-endorsements-for-judicial-campaign/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
– US Sen. Dick Durbin, D-IL and US Rep. Cheri Bustos, D-IL, who at the time, was chairwoman of the ** Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (https://rollcall.com/2018/11/29/cheri-bustos-elected-dccc-chair/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and a close ally of House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-CA.

“Judge Sutton has proven that she is knowledgeable, ethical, and just. She is the only candidate with judicial experience and the only candidate to have experience in areas across the spectrum of Illinois law,”
** said (https://www.wgil.com/2020/10/07/judge-emily-sutton-gains-bustos-and-durbin-endorsements-for-judicial-campaign/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Bustos in her endorsement of Sutton.

“Judge Emily Sutton is the only candidate with the experience and character necessary to serve the people of west-central Illinois as circuit court judge,”
** said (https://www.mcdonoughvoice.com/story/news/politics/elections/2020/10/07/senator-dick-durbin-endorses-emily-sutton-for-ninth-judicial-circuit/42812525/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Durbin in his endorsement of Sutton.

Upon further review of Tracy’s personal donations, records on the
** Illinois State Board of Elections website (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=xs6pE3aHsP7GjQPVV6Ds2A%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=2IwpeG5iH7o%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
reveal that he made personal donations to candidates ** aligned with Richard Irvin’s governor campaign (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=0000017e-6d5c-dbc8-a1ff-7d7dbf990000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Commissioner Sean Morrison, co-chairman of the Irvin campaign

State Rep. ** Tom Demmer (https://www.sj-r.com/story/news/politics/elections/state/2022/01/19/irvin-others-form-republican-slate-end-il-culture-corruption/6581468001/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, treasurer candidate and a member of the Irvin campaign’s slate of candidates

** Shannon Teresi (https://www.sj-r.com/story/news/politics/elections/state/2022/01/19/irvin-others-form-republican-slate-end-il-culture-corruption/6581468001/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, comptroller candidate and a member of the Irvin campaign’s slate of candidates

Jim Zay, who endorsed Irvin for governor

State Rep. Tim Ozinga, who endorsed Irvin for governor

State Rep. Tim Butler, who endorsed Irvin for governor

State Rep. Jim Durkin, who endorsed Irvin for governor

And although Tracy didn’t endorse any of the candidates for governor during the 2022 primary, his donation record in support of candidates aligned with Richard Irvin is telling.

His records also show that he didn’t make a single donation to any of the conservative grassroots candidates to include Darren Bailey, Peggy Hubbard, Matt Dubiel and many others.

Last January, when word began to spread about Irvin’s potential candidacy, Tracy confirmed to
** reporter Mark Maxwell (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1483094325428989953?s=51&t=5RbfNRUjNYXk8UoJCpZfAQ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
that he was in fact jumping into the race, saying that Irvin would announce his candidacy for governor on Martin Luther King Day.

Tracy told Maxwell that Irvin is “definitely a Republican,” and that he pulled
** Democratic primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
in 2014, 2016 and 2020 because “that’s where the action is,” in Chicago – even though Irvin is a mayor in Aurora, more than an hour west of Chicago.

** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-donates-to-democrat-endorsed-by-sen-durbin-just-months-before-his-il-gop-chair-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
A copy of Richard Irvin's voter history. (Source: Kane County Clerk's Office)

Illinois Review can’t recall a time when Tracy spoke to the press and offered a preview of any other candidate announcing their campaign for governor. A review of press articles reveals that Irvin was the only one.

Prior to running for governor, Irvin spent years
** praising (https://twitter.com/demgovs/status/1483091889607909379?s=61&t=PRMWA5ZjyteefflEsOtYwQ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker, referring to him as a,

“Great friend and a great leader.”

And in 2020, Irvin spoke at a Black Lives Matter rally
** yelling (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QOyFraLPPLo&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“I can’t breathe!”

The Illinois Republican party is in total disarray – and it has been, for years. And it explains why Republicans can never win in Illinois, despite solid, grassroots conservative candidates stepping up and running for office. The IL GOP leadership has too many connections with
** Democrats (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-national-committeemans-law-firm-donated-to-biden-harris.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

This also explains why GOP establishment leaders have a hard time supporting conservative grassroots candidates in Illinois.

If IL GOP leaders are serious about restoring our great party and purging our ranks of Democrats, then they should immediately call for the resignation of IL GOP chairman Don Tracy.

Until that happens, Republicans in Illinois will continue to be in the minority, while their leaders continue to befriend Democrats.

Or maybe that’s the goal.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=cb3e5c59f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_20_05_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-cb3e5c59f4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Pro Life Update
