This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=28aecb3ccaca4bac9c40c79eed185887&_e=gFLgBED0peEn2Qz1jVq43KRbKfFSK0-63Le0ZgBB45-1CQ-PNNWJiGe1h-fsZXtZddE2jPna6o4kQSYLfjAjXVJsSq5_JrEJnnpryEHveZjItiASPQWuYa7BO6KR-7q3dpyv0EdMH8oxP1-GZu7gtL7l-R9d1d1mqiS8Idi3t8853n3Etzi6IrIGVUq5ApUhJqBZEeEB7leV9xBXwa1ra82isJp0VLGw3_ZsU59hrvAoA7PK8oM-nge5f3BC3jt6aYo2l-XTmcsL3A2kDmvT-Wng0dOlBFWKPXVTYbNz85c8lRcXc57a9uMduH5oOezAeMa5s9-05gu-7kOw3fYPsmFzS5jv6lVHg1Agj8U2s-xu6gZ_R-fJ6jyJbcn1pPZA)
---
| | Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David's momentous story provides profound insights into many of life's most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **" The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King"** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David's character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we 've produced our online course, "The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King," which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=28aecb3ccaca4bac9c40c79eed185887&_e=gFLgBED0peEn2Qz1jVq43KRbKfFSK0-63Le0ZgBB45-1CQ-PNNWJiGe1h-fsZXtZddE2jPna6o4kQSYLfjAjXVJsSq5_JrEJnnpryEHveZjItiASPQWuYa7BO6KR-7q3dpyv0EdMH8oxP1-GZu7gtL7l-R9d1d1mqiS8Idi3t8853n3Etzi6IrIGVUq5ApUhJqBZEeEB7leV9xBXwa1ra82isJp0VLGw3_ZsU59hrvDIq0Lrlmt-yfkbKaxUzDVcgkDgxk3YmRFL9TxK9aVp32emmqV68WOQ4oX9XdU0gVF83Kfc71hVs50nFpQws4Pjk92vs4mx9SHAXmHn7QzHnBoJQyHrB3wVdrVygBXf2xb172D3SXgxz3pWc3eRST3S)** By viewing the course, you'll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you'll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you 'll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56204316/384262463/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTllY2Y4Zi1jMjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t32GxdvnX1S9QJZqhywHEOtuC9hdWxKNBADiiqjssMw=&emci=fb03d0e0-a880-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=019ecf8f-c280-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, The revelations contained in [yesterday's bombshell report from the _New York Times_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56204317/384262465/-2083832485?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTllY2Y4Zi1jMjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t32GxdvnX1S9QJZqhywHEOtuC9hdWxKNBADiiqjssMw=&emci=fb03d0e0-a880-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=019ecf8f-c280-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=17773801) about Congressman-elect George Santos are nothing short of shocking. **I immediately called on Mr. Santos to resign.** After all, it seems that nearly everything he told voters was a lie:
* He lied about graduating from Baruch College
* He lied about working for Citigroup and Goldman Sachs
* He lied about having an animal rescue charity
* He lied about where he lives

And perhaps most outrageous of all, he lied when he claimed that he had four employees who were killed in the mass shooting at the Pulse nightclub in Orlando. He used the pain of those who lost loved ones at Pulse – our mutual horror at that shooting – for his own personal, political advantage. I've been getting calls from local residents – Democrats and Republicans – who are outraged, and with good reason. He lied throughout two elections and he should be held accountable. **I'm speaking out and demanding action, and I hope you'll join me.** Earlier today, I joined NY-03 residents at his fake “Queens address” and called for him to step aside. Here are a few stories where you can learn more and share with your friends:
* [_News 12_ : Voters protest outside Rep.-elect George Santos' after report raises questions over qualifications](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56204319/384262466/1211870477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTllY2Y4Zi1jMjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t32GxdvnX1S9QJZqhywHEOtuC9hdWxKNBADiiqjssMw=&emci=fb03d0e0-a880-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=019ecf8f-c280-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=17773801)
* [_CBS New York_ : Calls grow for Congressman-elect George Santos to resign after allegedly lying about his background](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56204321/384262468/-1524264960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTllY2Y4Zi1jMjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t32GxdvnX1S9QJZqhywHEOtuC9hdWxKNBADiiqjssMw=&emci=fb03d0e0-a880-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=019ecf8f-c280-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=17773801)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, The revelations contained in about Congressman-elect George Santos are nothing short of shocking. I immediately called on Mr. Santos to resign. After all, it seems that nearly everything he told voters was a lie: He lied about graduating from Baruch College He lied about working for Citigroup and Goldman Sachs He lied about having an animal rescue charity He lied about where he lives And perhaps most outrageous of all, he lied when he claimed that he had four employees who were killed in the mass shooting at the Pulse nightclub in Orlando. He used the pain of those who lost loved ones at Pulse – our mutual horror at that shooting – for his own personal, political advantage. I've been getting calls from local residents – Democrats and Republicans – who are outraged, and with good reason. He lied throughout two elections and he should be held accountable. I'm speaking out and demanding action, and I hope you'll join me. Earlier today, I joined NY-03 residents at his fake “Queens address” and called for him to step aside. Here are a few stories where you can learn more and share with your friends: This scandal is moving fast. I'll keep you updated on what we know, when we know it. My bottom line? George Santos should resign. The folks of New York's 3rd District deserve a Member of Congress whom they can trust to tell the truth. Election regulators and law enforcement should determine whether any rules were broken or crimes committed by Santos and his campaign team. He has disqualified himself from serving in public office and he should resign immediately. Stay tuned! Donald J. Trump December 19th, 2022
Over the past two years, Joe Biden has invited millions of illegal aliens to infiltrate our country in a gigantic unlawful invasion. Now, after announcing on April 1, 2022 that he would end my Title 42 protections at the border, and declining to appeal numerous court rulings, Biden is getting what he always wanted: the termination of the most effective border security policy in modern history.

By abolishing what remains of Title 42, Biden is willfully and deliberately triggering a cataclysm of illegal immigration like the world has never seen before.

The border nightmare is happening for a single reason: because illegal aliens know that if they break into our country unlawfully, Joe Biden will do everything possible to ensure that they are not removed, and are allowed to stay here indefinitely.

This is one reason why the renewed push to ram through a catastrophic amnesty is so hideously destructive. Any form of amnesty now would be a historic disaster. It would reward Joe Biden’s lawlessness, it would reward the criminal cartels, it would reward child traffickers, and it would reward everyone who has broken the laws of our nation. Additionally, it would result in massively more illegal aliens and drugs pouring into American communities.

While the amnesty push is temporarily on hold for the lame duck, history shows that the amnesty lobby will be back with a vengeance in the new year. Every Republican must understand that any so-called “immigration reform” that gives Biden more resources will simply translate to even more releases. Biden inherited a flawless deportation system and he turned it into a mass-release machine. The border can ONLY be secured by confronting Biden’s lawless and criminal misconduct—and stopping his illicit crusade to set loose millions of illegal aliens into the interior.

To this end, Congress must immediately take three crucial actions.

FIRST, Congress must pass a TOTAL and PERMANENT BAN on Joe Biden or any other president using taxpayer dollars to release illegal aliens into our country. The best place to do that is in a federal spending bill. That is why Republicans must do whatever it takes to prevent Mitch McConnell from passing his sellout Omnibus Bill.

Congress should also defund Joe Biden’s lawless ICE memorandum that gutted ICE and halted criminal enforcement.

SECOND, having established a federal prohibition on all releases of illegal aliens, Congress needs to make permanent ALL of my administration’s groundbreaking border security reforms that allowed us to achieve the most secure border in history and to rapidly deport anyone who trespassed across our border. My Title 42 policy must be legislatively restored and made permanent, making clear that it can be used in any circumstance the president deems necessary for border management. Likewise, Remain in Mexico, our Safe Third Country agreements, expedited removals, 212(f), and many other vital Trump policies must be enshrined in federal law.

This way, when I am president, and forever after, we will have every authority to secure the border—and when Open Borders radicals like Biden are in the White House, they will be prohibited by law from returning to catch-and-release.

THIRD, knowing just how willing Joe Biden and his deputies have been to violate and dismantle the laws of our nation, Congress must establish CRIMINAL PENALTIES for any senior official or political appointee who orders, aids, or abets the mass-release of illegal aliens into the United States. What these Open Borders extremists are doing to our country is criminal—and it should be punished as such.

In the meantime, as we brace for a wave of illegal mass migration the likes of which has never been seen before, our prayers are with the brave Border Agents and ICE officers who Biden has so viciously betrayed. We thank them for their service, and we stand with them as they fight to keep bloodthirsty criminals, savage gangs, sadistic drug cartels, child and women smugglers, and human traffickers out of our country.

Trump December 19th, 2022 ICYMI: “Survey: Donald Trump Takes 5-Point Lead in Head-to-Head with Biden” Read the full article by Hannah Bleau with Breitbart . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump December 19th, 2022 Over the past two years, Joe Biden has invited millions of illegal aliens to infiltrate our country in a gigantic unlawful invasion. Now, after announcing on April 1, 2022 that he would end my Title 42 protections at the border, and declining to appeal numerous court rulings, Biden is getting what he always wanted: the termination of the most effective border security policy in modern history. By abolishing what remains of Title 42, Biden is willfully and deliberately triggering a cataclysm of illegal immigration like the world has never seen before. The border nightmare is happening for a single reason: because illegal aliens know that if they break into our country unlawfully, Joe Biden will do everything possible to ensure that they are not removed, and are allowed to stay here indefinitely. This is one reason why the renewed push to ram through a catastrophic amnesty is so hideously destructive. Any form of amnesty now would be a historic disaster. It would reward Joe Biden’s lawlessness, it would reward the criminal cartels, it would reward child traffickers, and it would reward everyone who has broken the laws of our nation. Additionally, it would result in massively more illegal aliens and drugs pouring into American communities. While the amnesty push is temporarily on hold for the lame duck, history shows that the amnesty lobby will be back with a vengeance in the new year. Every Republican must understand that any so-called “immigration reform” that gives Biden more resources will simply translate to even more releases. Biden inherited a flawless deportation system and he turned it into a mass-release machine. The border can ONLY be secured by confronting Biden’s lawless and criminal misconduct—and stopping his illicit crusade to set loose millions of illegal aliens into the interior. To this end, Congress must immediately take three crucial actions. FIRST, Congress must pass a TOTAL and PERMANENT BAN on Joe Biden or any other president using taxpayer dollars to release illegal aliens into our country. The best place to do that is in a federal spending bill. That is why Republicans must do whatever it takes to prevent Mitch McConnell from passing his sellout Omnibus Bill. Congress should also defund Joe Biden’s lawless ICE memorandum that gutted ICE and halted criminal enforcement. SECOND, having established a federal prohibition on all releases of illegal aliens, Congress needs to make permanent ALL of my administration’s groundbreaking border security reforms that allowed us to achieve the most secure border in history and to rapidly deport anyone who trespassed across our border. My Title 42 policy must be legislatively restored and made permanent, making clear that it can be used in any circumstance the president deems necessary for border management. Likewise, Remain in Mexico, our Safe Third Country agreements, expedited removals, 212(f), and many other vital Trump policies must be enshrined in federal law. This way, when I am president, and forever after, we will have every authority to secure the border—and when Open Borders radicals like Biden are in the White House, they will be prohibited by law from returning to catch-and-release. THIRD, knowing just how willing Joe Biden and his deputies have been to violate and dismantle the laws of our nation, Congress must establish CRIMINAL PENALTIES for any senior official or political appointee who orders, aids, or abets the mass-release of illegal aliens into the United States. What these Open Borders extremists are doing to our country is criminal—and it should be punished as such. In the meantime, as we brace for a wave of illegal mass migration the likes of which has never been seen before, our prayers are with the brave Border Agents and ICE officers who Biden has so viciously betrayed. We thank them for their service, and we stand with them as they fight to keep bloodthirsty criminals, savage gangs, sadistic drug cartels, child and women smugglers, and human traffickers out of our country. | ---|--- Donald J. https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43314%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GwLaowsYP1rSXwCj%2bxH%2bbQ&sysid=1 BREAKING: Major Decision Made On Kari Lake’s Election Lawsuit

Maricopa County Superior Judge Peter Thompson ruled that two of Kari Lake’s 10 different claims can go to trial. The claims allowed by Judge Thompson involve the breakdowns/malfunctioning of printers, along with Election Day and ballot chain of custody issues. Lake’s lawsuit alleged that between 15,603 and 29,257 Republicans were disenfranchised who would have likely voted for Lake, according to a calculation performed by data analyst Richard Baris of Big Data Poll who surveyed voters about whether they experienced problems on Election Day.

clean_body: BREAKING: Major Decision Made On Kari Lake’s Election Lawsuit Maricopa County Superior Judge Peter Thompson ruled that two of Kari Lake’s 10 different claims can go to trial. The claims allowed by Judge Thompson involve the breakdowns/malfunctioning of printers, along with Election Day and ballot chain of custody issues. Lake’s lawsuit alleged that between 15,603 and 29,257 Republicans were disenfranchised who would have likely voted for Lake, according to a calculation performed by data analyst Richard Baris of Big Data Poll who surveyed voters about whether they experienced problems on Election Day. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Bombshell allegations against George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Rep.-Elect Santos may have violated federal law. |
#
---
Peter, Yesterday, _The New York Times_ released a [bombshell review](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56204899/384273612/-2083832485?smtyp=cur&smid=tw-nytimes&refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmI0OTA5ZS1jNjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGbdguwf1eGTJYPnNlbp3vKBEiUG_oEdlJ79sJ4lznI=&emci=e4e2810d-bc80-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=dbb4909e-c680-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=13556823) of Republican Rep.-Elect George Santos’ background — suggesting that he significantly misrepresented or outright lied about his career path, financial status, and life story on the campaign trail. Rep.-Elect Santos hasn’t denied the allegations made against him, among them that he made key omissions on financial disclosure forms to the Federal Elections Commission, that he is currently facing a criminal charge in Brazil, and that he was never, as he claimed, employed by prominent Wall Street firms that he made the centerpiece of his biography on the campaign trail. **If the allegations made by the _Times_ are true, there are at least two federal crimes at play:**
1. Conspiracy to defraud the United States (the same charge that the House January 6th committee recommended the Justice Department pursue against Donald Trump yesterday), and

2. Filing false statements to the Federal Elections Commission.

The _Times_ ’ report and Rep.-Elect Santos’ alleged actions are shocking but sadly not surprising. Rep.-Elect Santos aligned himself firmly with Donald Trump and MAGA lawlessness, trafficking in election conspiracies, and making public appearances alongside white supremacists. He’s following a cynical Republican playbook — gain power by any means necessary, even if it means lying to the very people who voted him into office. This isn’t a game. Representing your community in Congress is a serious job, and New Yorkers deserve better than to have a conman fraudulently lie his way into office. So I need your help, Peter **I am urging the U.S. Attorney for the Eastern District of New York and the FBI to investigate these allegations — which undermine public confidence in elected officials and potentially amount to violations of multiple federal laws. If you agree, add your name next to mine today.** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56204900/384273614/2093478844?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmI0OTA5ZS1jNjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGbdguwf1eGTJYPnNlbp3vKBEiUG_oEdlJ79sJ4lznI=&emci=e4e2810d-bc80-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=dbb4909e-c680-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=13556823)
---
Thanks,
Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States **[dangoldmanforny.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56204901/384273615/1064912967?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmI0OTA5ZS1jNjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGbdguwf1eGTJYPnNlbp3vKBEiUG_oEdlJ79sJ4lznI=&emci=e4e2810d-bc80-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=dbb4909e-c680-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=13556823) | [info@dangoldmanforny.com](mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com)** | **Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**

Representing your community in Congress is a serious job, and New Yorkers deserve better than to have a conman fraudulently lie his way into office. So I need your help, Peter I am urging the U.S. Attorney for the Eastern District of New York and the FBI to investigate these allegations — which undermine public confidence in elected officials and potentially amount to violations of multiple federal laws. If you agree, add your name next to mine today. | Thanks, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

I won’t mince words:
– First, I watched Democrats defy the odds and defeat nearly every last Republican election-denier in the midterms.
– Then, I watched Trump, McCarthy, and McConnell pivot to 2024 to get their revenge.
– Now, I’m watching them BEG right-wing special interests for cash to help them do it.
I mean every word I’m about to say:
[**_We have a historic opportunity to win BACK-TO-BACK elections, keep extremist Republicans OUT of power for good, and make this the ERA of Democratic progress. But we can’t do it if we let Republicans’ schemes go unchecked. Here’s my plan: Before midnight, I’m calling on another 890 Democrats to become Founding Donors for the next election. clean_body: 2024 starts today | | | | | Friend, It’s been a little over a month since you helped Team Kean deliver a historic victory to New Jersey’s 7th Congressional District and flipped a seat that was crucial for Republicans taking back the House, but the Democrats are already preparing to take it back. Although the new Congress hasn’t even started, and the 2024 election is even farther away, we already have a target on our backs and special interest groups are already running attack ads against Tom. Our race was one of the closest - and most important - of 2022 and it’s already shaping up to be that way again in the next election. The road to victory in 2024 is paved with the actions we take today. Will you step up to help keep our district red? Thank you, JasonTeam Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2022 Kean for Congress

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cabd15cf68f472884b9b18818b0f775&_e=C29wS3R7M3iTVryNxT-g4zPrkrZDWg3ZmeHgWp2PpbuZ9whQZvlR_3Ab3j0PvZWNSarbTie9ZTcNoWyRv-Yr-6-9cDzQ_jERq1NdHzKPjvfOvjBtkydZB_bO00unYutDhhS0SM7zEXIdImfAuVXqAledrJ91X8Tl-ZoF0pabPdj1dS6mIDzk53JvCobihHd9rw4iW-TdtaZggPiUgyrLQn2LyykgjJtruFdu6rEZTasQkBJ9tJ-7CUxA0uU7yuXehv5z_SfGxFjkGwU0CGOwhrQR1gGVuVw699WgrDwMxPi-ZuY3WSJE1_3A_rcmfy2Umw9XbJvqmoLpsYwC-pVpYO7WnJV0ZssuhZsLb7IeloMAYZV0C6sFIPgljH6YcqD9)
---
| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David's momentous story provides profound insights into many of life's most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **" The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King"** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David's character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we 've produced our online course, "The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King," which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cabd15cf68f472884b9b18818b0f775&_e=C29wS3R7M3iTVryNxT-g4zPrkrZDWg3ZmeHgWp2PpbuZ9whQZvlR_3Ab3j0PvZWNSarbTie9ZTcNoWyRv-Yr-6-9cDzQ_jERq1NdHzKPjvfOvjBtkydZB_bO00unYutDhhS0SM7zEXIdImfAuVXqAledrJ91X8Tl-ZoF0pabPdj1dS6mIDzk53JvCobihHd9rw4iW-TdtaZggPiUgyrLQn2LyykgjJtruFdu6rEZTaslD8R3to2odloWN1oStiNgyC9K9VYQnIUDBgqpRI-JcRzkdKkukziYQDGv5TJfXyfvlR1hqhqX7Pp0SKoz66r7nt2pREwH4VtUWLQ3SYIlTNZBbJoj7xWfZa6g7XJ09YjUc8szLrMhyuzk_18nYu_Q)** By viewing the course, you'll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you'll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you 'll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cabd15cf68f472884b9b18818b0f775&_e=C29wS3R7M3iTVryNxT-g4zPrkrZDWg3ZmeHgWp2PpbuZ9whQZvlR_3Ab3j0PvZWNSarbTie9ZTcNoWyRv-Yr-6-9cDzQ_jERq1NdHzKPjvfOvjBtkydZB_bO00unYutDhhS0SM7zEXIdImfAuVXqAledrJ91X8Tl-ZoF0pabPdj1dS6mIDzk53JvCobihHd9rw4iW-TdtaZggPiUgyrLQn2LyykgjJtruFdu6rEZTav_MI6cV7MUoYTVgW_5YhbL5YnUXih4kldMBM5KVJdopZE7Iir7aBAiXvWU8Wqflh0_00GgBMbjRa3IL_sGnQEht-bpCH_6DcuzMrcuxOYaI1XS_QXn6QWrKJapJE38tZyomHXyKfM0_NuuwFvtiZ7o)
---
| | Let's learn what truly matters in life by studying **" The David Story."**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you'd like to secure a DVD box set of **" The David Story"** while they're available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cabd15cf68f472884b9b18818b0f775&_e=C29wS3R7M3iTVryNxT-g4zPrkrZDWg3ZmeHgWp2PpbuZ9whQZvlR_3Ab3j0PvZWNSarbTie9ZTcNoWyRv-Yr-6-9cDzQ_jERq1NdHzKPjvfOvjBtkydZB_bO00unYutDhhS0SM7zEXIdImfAuVXqAledrJ91X8Tl-ZoF0pabPdj1dS6mIDzk53JvCobihHd9rw4iW-TdtaZggPiUgyrLQn2LyykgjJtruFdu6rEZTauwxMKIIAyAKKOqUmmIGTgMzqGgNhLJ_1kPT3egF5P-VZ5nrQQC0dQnH4TkzZGSbWEKJ3C69IQsMjaO0T94fuUulAxd4rULgwP4aIYVrVtwkfNmA3tXto2kUWvrb8pl83lIGF2x-DTHq_UwCEUbDAuU)**

| | Fellow Conservative, Our southern border is a raging fire of cartel-driven human tracking and drug smuggling. And, once again, **Congress is ignoring the human suffering on the border to spend its time on a**** _disastrous_****amnesty proposal that only adds fuel to the fire!**

| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e757ee22c054a129b1c2d28bacf8fcf&_e=0HGiKgI4jVf8GclZXg91F1B0efzoo-IofCAZzeaA4VqDM1Lt47Sp-v9JtQxmzXo4uMLCZ1TRg8QsM0tmusnfynLi6Qi3SUN4DSBVpz-DpNt1aW-xsUQ3Sq2IdDuMrGazljkwL-nflUPi-IIeTJeXUCZi_6fAFsYEgsXvZY9M93OC6G5N3VsWLFhszE0UFtUEKXYA9OKcReJnmkqCVqR8vHRpJOGJ6e4ajc59Nd8Ul92PiX8xDtNfhk7wgoNvndPpsSUzp9C6K0bAOr_VNDtyFZ4Cbr59gy8NaxMXQZhWgmEkwIrMgAYY0KGNFEnIqFGjOWdHDn6yTrZBcCGpAKdaop7ye0CSAgbqp4wsb9qWVk0fwbdJwpIMTvJZiHrQzUslc1Vlml-N9tMyUMgLtTzR5Q%3D%3D)

name: Greg Casar
subject: Shaking things up
body:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Greg Casar here, Congressman-elect for TX-35.
Justice Democrats helped me win my race and did the same for many other progressives who were elected across the country, from Pennsylvania to Missouri to down here in Texas.
We know that to transform the status quo, we need bold progressives who will deliver for working families in Washington. That’s what Justice Democrats does — recruit and endorse local leaders to fight for our communities.
Just like my campaign, JD relies on grassroots contributions, not big, corporate PACs to get their work done. Justice Democrats just launched their 2024 Candidate Recruitment efforts and so I have a favor to ask of you:
[**Will you consider making a small contribution today to support JD’s 2024 candidate recruitment? It will make a really big difference as we fight to pass the transformative policies that our people need and deserve.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123637?refcode=em20221220-26658&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26658%2E1203867%2EwPLjU1)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123637?refcode=em20221220-26658&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26658%2E1203867%2EwPLjU1)**
I am so proud to be a Justice Democrat. After constant attacks from the likes of extreme Republicans like Greg Abbott, working Texans need a progressive fighter who can deliver on Medicare for All, good jobs, and reproductive rights. Lives depend on it.
I am ready to be that fighter in Congress starting on Jan. 3rd. By supporting JD today, together we can elect even more progressives to Congress who will fight together for bold solutions to the issues we face.
[**Please support Justice Democrats today by making a contribution to Justice Democrats to help them reach their $120,000 2024 Candidate Recruitment fundraising goal.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123637?refcode=em20221220-26658&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26658%2E1203867%2EwPLjU1)
Thank you for your time and support,
Greg Casar
Congressman-Elect
Texas Congressional District 35

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=26658%2E1203867%2EwPLjU1) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=26658%2E1203867%2EwPLjU1) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221220-26658-footer&t=24&refcode2=26658_1203867_wPLjU1&akid=26658%2E1203867%2EwPLjU1)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=26658%2E1203867%2EwPLjU1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=26658%2E1203867%2EwPLjU1)

Republicans have already set their sights on tearing down all of our rights and Democratic strongholds across the nation. Everything is at stake in the next round of elections.
If we want to make sure our communities are taken care of, we need to activate enough members to build an immediate, on-the-ground campaign in the states now.

body:

| | | **Democratic leaders are fighting to defend and EXPAND our Senate majority, but your membership is _STILL_ inactive!**

**DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT**

[**Our crucial deadline is MIDNIGHT:
Please stand with Senator Warnock and join the fight to EXPAND our Senate majority by activating your membership today >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11383?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221220-MembershipUpdate-WarnockMembership2024-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221220-MembershipUpdate-WarnockMembership2024-ETG-sl1&akid=9238%2E9716520%2EdEx_4t)

---

Team -- So many Democratic leaders are reaching out with an URGENT message: **We _MUST_ lay the groundwork to defend and expand our Senate majority to keep moving America forward!**

Raphael Warnock, Chuck Schumer, and even former President Obama have ALL said how _**crucial_** it is to elect more Senate Democrats. And with our next major deadline just _hours_ away, tonight is our chance to PROVE that we won't let them down!

Our grassroots team made history this year, but we can’t take anything for granted. Mitch McConnell is ALREADY plotting to take back the Senate in 2024, and **we must be ready to FIGHT.**

**We’ve set an ambitious goal to answer our leaders' calls by activating 500 memberships before our midnight deadline -- but our records show that your membership is STILL inactive!**

**[Please activate your Democratic membership before MIDNIGHT to join the team that's fighting to DEFEND and EXPAND our Democratic majority for years to come >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11383?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221220-MembershipUpdate-WarnockMembership2024-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221220-MembershipUpdate-WarnockMembership2024-ETG-sl1&akid=9238%2E9716520%2EdEx_4t)**

**[Activate My Membership](https://go.dscc.org/go/11383?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221220-MembershipUpdate-WarnockMembership2024-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221220-MembershipUpdate-WarnockMembership2024-ETG-sl1&akid=9238%2E9716520%2EdEx_4t)**

Team DSCC

body:
URGE THE DOJ CHARGE DONALD TRUMP >>
| **BREAKING: January 6th Committee Refers Donald Trump for Criminal Prosecution** | [**15,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: URGE THE DOJ TO PROSECUTE TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump-22/?source=VPP_20221220_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5895%2E878179%2E1iiXRq)
---
**FIRST:** Donald Trump REFUSED to accept Pres. Biden's 2020 victory and incited the deadly, treasonous January 6th attack on our Capitol.

**THEN:** The heroic January 6th Committee sprang into action to reveal the TRUTH about Trump and expose the MAGA mob's vicious crimes.

**_NOW:_** The Committee has officially referred Trump to the Department of Justice for criminal prosecution -- _but he 's not going down without a fight!_ **In just a few short weeks, the MAGA GOP will seize control of the House and DESTROY all of the January 6th Committee 's progress!** [**So we need 15,000 Democrats to sign our petition RIGHT NOW to urge the DOJ to charge Trump before it 's too late! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump-22/?source=VPP_20221220_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5895%2E878179%2E1iiXRq) | [**15,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: URGE THE DOJ TO PROSECUTE TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump-22/?source=VPP_20221220_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5895%2E878179%2E1iiXRq)
---
**DEADLINE:_MIDNIGHT_ || GOAL: _15,000 SIGNATURES_**
Kevin McCarthy and the GOP are already plotting to dissolve the January 6th investigation and let Trump off SCOT-FREE the second they take power.

Our ONLY HOPE of locking Trump up is if the Department of Justice prosecutes him IMMEDIATELY.

**_So we need to rally MASSIVE grassroots support!_**
[**PETITION CLOSING AT MIDNIGHT: SIGN RIGHT NOW!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump-22/?source=VPP_20221220_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5895%2E878179%2E1iiXRq)
[**15,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: URGE THE DOJ TO PROSECUTE TRUMP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/charge-trump-22/?source=VPP_20221220_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=5895%2E878179%2E1iiXRq)
---
Thank you,

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5895%2E878179%2E1iiXRq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5895%2E878179%2E1iiXRq).**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqi5t5l23j61191jec2n4tjbb3el8tffg25sq6u0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf8jmemj72sjkm1qj791lmkp79dhk6ep34t5l6cqb7dpjkorrbdt6e5p79c3l6uh7ac9km9qjccbnsor7fl9lmgqb3df161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4or7fljhe9qb0t9km4qu8oj5cpjm2op66prtfcpj6pqj2tf0ccj3ctul6po7bpdk6ioredbjm8gq48bi4bh28or7chim1or2cpi649fg)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdc7me4aibf5jpdtk44m5t10v5h37grcng4op2qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4clge6oj6chh2bs)

Chief Justice John Roberts issued the stay on Monday after a number of states requested the high court’s intervention. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lt.=20Col.=20=E2=80=9CBull=E2=80=9D=20Gurfein=20=28Ret.=29?=
subject: Be a hero, help a hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots
body:
They sacrificed for our freedom. Now it’s time we repay that debt.

https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av

Friend,

The holiday season is a joyous time for many.

But, sadly, there are American Heroes who will be missing from the festivities this year.

Bob Bales, Neftaly Platero, and Calvin Gibbs are three of these Warriors currently behind bars and separated from loved ones.
https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av

These innocent Warriors were wrongly accused of crimes while serving in the United States’ Armed Forces.

They were ripped away from their families and forced to endure long trials. Some are even threatened with LIFE in prison.
BRING OUR HEROES HOME (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)

These Warriors sacrificed so much for our country and deserve more than sham trials and media scrutiny. That’s why the United American Patriots team is fighting to get them the justice they’re owed.

We are doing everything we can to secure the best legal defense teams for their cases and generate more positive public awareness.

But if we’re going to get these Heroes home for the holidays, we need the support of Patriots like you.

Can we count on you to make a contribution to our Warrior Fund? (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $250 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $100 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $75 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $50 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: $35 (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)
BRING OUR HEROES HOME: OTHER (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)

Our mission here at UAP is to Defend the Defenders of our country. The work we do - supported and funded by patriots like you - helps clear the names of these veterans and their families.

Today, I ask you to consider donating at this secure link to help bring these men home to enjoy the holiday season for years to come: https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-5527327/bring-our-heroes-home (https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av)

Thank you,
https://secure.winred.com/united-american-patriots-inc/action-av-5527327/?utm_source=av&utm_campaign=5527327&utm_medium=prosp&utm_term=home-for-holidays&utm_content=av

David “Bull” Gurfein

Lt. Col., USMCR (Ret.)

CEO, United American Patriots

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Both Elon Musk and Donald Trump threw a fit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, this is a long(ish) email about billionaires. I know. But
I’m hoping you’ll read it anyway.

It’s easy to make fun of billionaires. It’s harder to hold them
accountable. But that’s what I’ve been doing — every day — and now,
they’re firing back at me.

Last week, I called on Elon Musk and Twitter to take action.

Specifically, I called on the Biden Administration to investigate Musk’s
company Neuralink, which reportedly engaged in animal cruelty to beat
competitors in their research efforts. Scores of animals were subjected to
painful and needless injuries and death.

Then, I called on Musk and Twitter to take action on hate speech running
rampant on the platform. Slurs against Black people tripled. Slurs against
women increased by 33 percent. Slurs against gay men increased by 58
percent. And slurs against Jewish people have increased by 61 percent.

Those are the facts.

Elon Musk ... did not like that at all. And in a now-deleted tweet,
responded in a truly sophomoric way:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]Adam Schiff @RepAdamSchiff Elon Musk calls himself a free speech absolutist,
to justify turning a blind eye to hatred and bigotry on Twitter. But when
journalists report unfavorable news, they are banned without warning. The
devotion to free speech is apparently not that absolute. But the hypocrisy is.
Elon Musk @ElonMusk Thankfully, you lose your chairmanship very soon. Your brain
is too small.

At the same time, a different billionaire (or so he claims), in advance of
being held accountable for his actions by the January 6 Committee and
being referred for criminal prosecution, the twice-impeached failed
president Donald Trump lashed out at me, too:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump The highly partisan Unselect Committee is
illegally leaking confidential info to anyone that will listen. Adam 'Shifty'
Schiff is all over T.V. talking about Criminal Referrals, just like he was on
the Russia, Russia, Russia Hoax, which turned out to be the con of the century.
How much longer are Republicans, and American Patriots in general, going to
allow this to happen. These are the Criminals who spied on my campaign, cheated
on the Election, lied to FISA Court & Congress. They are SICK!

I’m not going to stop holding these guys accountable. But each time they
attack me with lies and innuendo, I trend on Twitter (and not in a good
way).

That’s why I’m asking you to help me respond to Trump and Elon. Right now.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]Can you rush a contribution to our campaign to help respond to Trump
and Elon’s attacks before they’re magnified even more by their legion of
far-right social media trolls? If we don’t respond directly to these lies
and refute them, they could take root and spread further.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=dec2022_abs_em.1CmCse&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=dec2022_abs_em.IT0Q1v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=dec2022_abs_em.pdjp7M&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=dec2022_abs_em.n-QQjE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1010&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=dec2022_abs_em.26VRxt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1011&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221220_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1012&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for all you do,

Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1479%2E5257348%2ESt3VH4 ]Privacy Policy

subject: Will Peter hold Trump accountable?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
we’re worried because Republicans are working around the clock to sweep this evidence under the rug

| | Peter, yesterday the January 6th committee _blew us away_ in their final public hearing!

**They presented not ONE,_but FOUR_ criminal referrals for Donald Trump. _Finally, Donald Trump may be held accountable for his crimes!_**

But Peter, we’re worried — because Republicans are working around the clock to sweep this evidence under the rug, and they’re hoping Democrats like you ignore us!

body:
This pro-life dad was targeted by the FBI — and now he’s making his voice heard >>>| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=361248ce91b44fa9b4bfd11a9de8b729&_e=CYQP4S-HVkJJU4arfjjoTE_PUdnt8Mthsd-T_gVWQBhUqSsdmfj5zXYt3L1Qdv4qHweaXs93r_JesMH6H2yaH_Ptxg6nm8p6bzmErZ79ZOpQbvAGqSrnJAHvXMOih4KdRpODmHO36uTbCOFO1PKFeCCJOnkixtf7gfCkttGeoeSFKKijlZljOv07SwNhOrN1c_1hJ61RpZW8sAgox1EZgR5bMVjYfC8XTOsaru5fS4ttOclEAmInxnvxYv8vqtnlqnEb8w228aF02PYh6f_syTLSXA2S1D1EuBJzcCoMup7V1L_asEASycLMzKWN3Gwq5Gg6ib0dp6bl0-bDPu6XMjIYHhh9S5VsSCevIAleDPQHHCpHC_iIWo0Y7TP9E5udaDeJe0ldbYLiz742Oa8X76sBD-E02TRN5QZiWC0qvBQ4ioq7ow1meukebSjRwBOa)
---
Peter, You've heard the story of Mark Houck, the pro-life father the FBI arrested at gunpoint. _But this story has a new twist that you may not have heard._ Now, he's taking the fight to the DOJ by accusing them of viewpoint discrimination and selective prosecution — and he's right to do so.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=361248ce91b44fa9b4bfd11a9de8b729&_e=CYQP4S-HVkJJU4arfjjoTE_PUdnt8Mthsd-T_gVWQBhUqSsdmfj5zXYt3L1Qdv4qHweaXs93r_JesMH6H2yaH_Ptxg6nm8p6bzmErZ79ZOpQbvAGqSrnJAHvXMOih4KdRpODmHO36uTbCOFO1PKFeCCJOnkixtf7gfCkttGeoeSFKKijlZljOv07SwNhOrN1c_1hJ61RpZW8sAgox1EZgR5bMVjYfC8XTOsaru5fS4ttOclEAmInxnvxYv8vqtnlqnEb8w228aF02PYh6f_syebeCZZv1STqGA4RNrhO-j01MKn9Y-Cj3mO2q32JsXXiesTSpRCuZfrid-8nX9bpvRQBRw_3isJRQ-D3JLbIfJ7JfQUPOQAEspCb5iN360aKNE5uaHlBU6xCgkVrEyxDT7QQMgkDK1BBVMbwzA4ol4AHBXRD6YMpfPSVoSWMZ5px)
---
Peter, it's not enough for us to cobble together legal defense funds for conservatives who are the victims of politicized law enforcement agencies. **We have to go on offense.** **It's time to fight the root problem:**[_**the leftist activists who have infiltrated our judicial system.**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=361248ce91b44fa9b4bfd11a9de8b729&_e=CYQP4S-HVkJJU4arfjjoTE_PUdnt8Mthsd-T_gVWQBhUqSsdmfj5zXYt3L1Qdv4qHweaXs93r_JesMH6H2yaH_Ptxg6nm8p6bzmErZ79ZOpQbvAGqSrnJAHvXMOih4KdRpODmHO36uTbCOFO1PKFeCCJOnkixtf7gfCkttGeoeSFKKijlZljOv07SwNhOrN1c_1hJ61RpZW8sAgox1EZgR5bMVjYfC8XTOsaru5fS4ttOclEAmInxnvxYv8vqtnlqnEb8w228aF02PYh6f_syU8ORk-I2cTXym6b4GBnJgRGvwQgyJJu8okOsny3LY1HGadDx7zzZNsEIohS-dVU1MRmmmMytJl-FdQIDY4rUCNOSEWNrtsdk4m4q3Wm2AGJr5Shvw3CpTJFKUzGFm-ll2UZhC1rH3lHzqSS563cW10-xMPpknqXg5wol_fEWL0L)
---
| | **_Are you ready to go on offense against the liberal activists who have infiltrated our judicial system?_**
---
| | [YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=361248ce91b44fa9b4bfd11a9de8b729&_e=CYQP4S-HVkJJU4arfjjoTE_PUdnt8Mthsd-T_gVWQBhUqSsdmfj5zXYt3L1Qdv4qHweaXs93r_JesMH6H2yaH_Ptxg6nm8p6bzmErZ79ZOpQbvAGqSrnJAHvXMOih4KdRpODmHO36uTbCOFO1PKFeCCJOnkixtf7gfCkttGeoeSFKKijlZljOv07SwNhOrN1c_1hJ61RpZW8sAgox1EZgR5bMVjYfC8XTOsaru5fS4ttOclEAmInxnvxYv8vqtnlqnEb8w228aF02PYh6f_sycM4Qn7MXJhWrPMyTJvdfN5I-eoUfQNkoziQ-1dunfE5cVU7knXIqHP9EOrDBT7oMwyjhqfcIUfNxQ1reGjZOZ62yjoIFeKp2K02KdFUQpmSTzxY9PpgZPZEEuGnfISFNU6cu-hV_y1VKPDxRQUqDPNEFyTD4CYxh_XqUahE9OQB)

| [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=361248ce91b44fa9b4bfd11a9de8b729&_e=CYQP4S-HVkJJU4arfjjoTE_PUdnt8Mthsd-T_gVWQBhUqSsdmfj5zXYt3L1Qdv4qHweaXs93r_JesMH6H2yaH_Ptxg6nm8p6bzmErZ79ZOpQbvAGqSrnJAHvXMOih4KdRpODmHO36uTbCOFO1PKFeCCJOnkixtf7gfCkttGeoeSFKKijlZljOv07SwNhOrN1c_1hJ61RpZW8sAgox1EZgR5bMVjYfC8XTOsaru5fS4ttOclEAmInxnvxYv8vqtnlqnEb8w228aF02PYh6f_syQpDpvMFiYpKmEV5d3osJX8qwn0yzT9x1e1qk0_rxIu5tHBKoHthT9brqLgENQqreXbAGlIuLNAKXqsZ2L3USFOycM7xsOaRDBdpkW5JJuLP8AcMXkyZWh8J7bJFkUTpIrp4myPYQu78hq1AAiJfbBYUkz6EFZdWfDcgZxQun-GJ)
---
| | As a well-informed conservative, you’ve heard of judicial activism before — but too many people think of it as something that happens only at the level of the Supreme Court. Peter, that’s simply not true. It happens at EVERY level of the judiciary. And that’s why**Fair Courts America** exists. **Our mission is to fight back against the woke mob’s takeover of our judicial system, from the Supreme Court to your local prosecutor. ** So when the Pennsylvania Supreme Court decides to amend the state constitution by decree and change how elections are run, __we’re there to fight back._ _ When liberal prosecutors in red states decide to thwart the will of the people by declaring they will decline to enforce pro-life legislation, __we won’t let them get away with it.__ And when the Left tries to pack the Supreme Court,____we won’t let them change the rules of our republic.__
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=361248ce91b44fa9b4bfd11a9de8b729&_e=CYQP4S-HVkJJU4arfjjoTE_PUdnt8Mthsd-T_gVWQBhUqSsdmfj5zXYt3L1Qdv4qHweaXs93r_JesMH6H2yaH_Ptxg6nm8p6bzmErZ79ZOpQbvAGqSrnJAHvXMOih4KdRpODmHO36uTbCOFO1PKFeCCJOnkixtf7gfCkttGeoeSFKKijlZljOv07SwNhOrN1c_1hJ61RpZW8sAgox1EZgR5bMVjYfC8XTOsaru5fS4ttOclEAmInxnvxYv8vqtnlqnEb8w228aF02PYh6f_syaxzHDZQvWegR_hVVFfxTTluP87-sIggbKlbfeNz-EVE8iSvd3XMg90NM3hluWmVXLfCmPgpNWU5Ek0de0ktyXr0eA_oyPROpIocguJQNlLIPz3mLmmlgPHIUjUI8VHzUC3SYSn_gjyuowaOwWcQkVPyfpz2NHZ0J1uV0e9NPkEe)

Tracking these races across the country is a massive undertaking — but it is absolutely critical to protecting our republic. [**_Peter, we need your help. Any amount you can give will support our efforts to defend the rule of law in our country. The woke mob is advancing on our courts right now, and only one thing can stop them from total takeover: YOU._**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=361248ce91b44fa9b4bfd11a9de8b729&_e=CYQP4S-HVkJJU4arfjjoTE_PUdnt8Mthsd-T_gVWQBhUqSsdmfj5zXYt3L1Qdv4qHweaXs93r_JesMH6H2yaH_Ptxg6nm8p6bzmErZ79ZOpQbvAGqSrnJAHvXMOih4KdRpODmHO36uTbCOFO1PKFeCCJOnkixtf7gfCkttGeoeSFKKijlZljOv07SwNhOrN1c_1hJ61RpZW8sAgox1EZgR5bMVjYfC8XTOsaru5fS4ttOclEAmInxnvxYv8vqtnlqnEb8w228aF02PYh6f_sybVmvnO1FEdhmvuyIJfk1E-qs-z0DRndq_vbePvqpb-28JehREb78LP201q3PbJzb5M30Nav83usIdnOgttb8kBZDWcgV-NNqWa2R0tRIjV1vFN1dKj4BTGreM_8S3H_uH2sQBvI3-3nZ2AXslotYo8jDYUfuIZVDxepaIlpO-yU)

body:
Industry leaders are gearing up to unseat anti-Big Pharma lawmakers like me in 2024.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56201119/384252908/2131117389?refcode=BLU-SWC-20221220-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQ1NjI0OS1hZjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwLaYZ5B09d7lSTxOOoTRs9zVyFrYxNWbaPLKOAkdvM=)
---
| Peter –

I’ve been fighting against Big Pharma since I got to Congress. As part of that work, I was so proud to vote in favor of the Inflation Reduction Act, which President Biden signed into law earlier this year.

Among other historic measures, the bill allows Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices – so it’s no surprise that Big Pharma sees it as a significant loss. Now, they’ve commissioned a report to figure out why they couldn’t stop Democrats from passing this drug-pricing legislation.

**Industry leaders are gearing up to unseat anti-Big Pharma lawmakers like me in 2024.[_Will you chip in $5 or more today to send a message to Big Pharma that we won’t go back to unfair prescription drug pricing?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56201120/384252909/-1389333690?refcode=BLU-SWC-20221220-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQ1NjI0OS1hZjgwLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwLaYZ5B09d7lSTxOOoTRs9zVyFrYxNWbaPLKOAkdvM=)**

clean_body: Industry leaders are gearing up to unseat anti-Big Pharma lawmakers like me in 2024. | = | Peter – I’ve been fighting against Big Pharma since I got to Congress. As part of that work, I was so proud to vote in favor of the Inflation Reduction Act, which President Biden signed into law earlier this year. Among other historic measures, the bill allows Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices – so it’s no surprise that Big Pharma sees it as a significant loss. Now, they’ve commissioned a report to figure out why they couldn’t stop Democrats from passing this drug-pricing legislation. Industry leaders are gearing up to unseat anti-Big Pharma lawmakers like me in 2024.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for standing with me, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: James C. Roberts, American Veterans Center
subject: Send a note of support to all who served this Holiday season
body:
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=78dc08b083f144539dcd2d9c4bad2591&_e=g94vdMk4jZb-gvIhTQZNKwvmaLmT_0IFtTEmPJpivLly4ybgnxJE0CsUsfLSdu04iRcZxRNFxz9SBxdevUWyZNGMOtSbUy4FHhQEtrYkyD_2UEYkgwQe8Kc0M3NTW4RQEBgm-DIU6igkkQ54UhoqrrZkJqtBLbhxRBBGjQ3YW4f1HmMTqU8mZ2p07zM_mlIaLLdsd3WAyXmxXaPsKKjmaEnVSIgiyOrRmjQ_VDNLZyguF_ehIek_oz9fl7SxT76tRIEdTxP69hTnVnTG_rqKqb7K-i9pcjyz8ndosqq3CBYQB1y2yC-DaxW6hl07GfL7)

Friend, This Christmas season, the American Veterans Center is preparing a massive Christmas Card to share with veterans across the nation. The American Veterans Center does more than _any other organization_ to tell the stories and preserve the legacies of America's heroes. It's been our honor to be trusted by work with thousands of veterans, from World War II to Iraq and Afghanistan. [**We've set a goal of 50,000 signatures for this special card by Christmas Eve, December 24th. Will you add your name now it?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=78dc08b083f144539dcd2d9c4bad2591&_e=g94vdMk4jZb-gvIhTQZNKwvmaLmT_0IFtTEmPJpivLly4ybgnxJE0CsUsfLSdu04iRcZxRNFxz9SBxdevUWyZNGMOtSbUy4FHhQEtrYkyD_2UEYkgwQe8Kc0M3NTW4RQEBgm-DIU6igkkQ54UhoqrrZkJqtBLbhxRBBGjQ3YW4cW603cnHWc7KcYX4MUJA1W7Sh7OA6Hdc1nyyWTEV7b_MkL3OiKHiMHOCn5oO7WwY2tBgEEyPaGnPnKQRRw3xfg3LawTo9axJOCj18VKXgUsYoqH0FKhSxFfcCxCg08ZRP765nM5j1mu9lJ3Ut8uzHr)
---
[**Sign AVC's Veteran Christmas Card**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=78dc08b083f144539dcd2d9c4bad2591&_e=g94vdMk4jZb-gvIhTQZNKwvmaLmT_0IFtTEmPJpivLly4ybgnxJE0CsUsfLSdu04iRcZxRNFxz9SBxdevUWyZNGMOtSbUy4FHhQEtrYkyD_2UEYkgwQe8Kc0M3NTW4RQEBgm-DIU6igkkQ54UhoqrrZkJqtBLbhxRBBGjQ3YW4eh8lpXx17TY8HvZv9UgADK6y5s7aX1pfg50EaJCk2fl2blTEA1XE5CTxNLD3tabt-muprEmMhwJabg2T1EgHKvBm278iOju3z4GfxDQ-747-2GoWO_xpXClxHct8S2xKf40AaW3kag1rWB79o6exsH)

This holiday season, just like every year, it's vitally important to show our heroic veterans the support the deserve. **By reaching our goal of 50,000 signatures, we're sending a message of support to let all those who have served know that patriotic Americans will forever remain thankful for their sacrifice for our nation.** _And we 'll share the Christmas card signatures and personal notes of support with veterans from World War II through to today._ As thousands of the courageous men and women who served in World War II, Korea, Vietnam and beyond leave us each day, it is our duty to let those who have served know that we have not _and will not_ forget their sacrifice.
